presets.name: Axeman Skeleton
presets.behavior: (+3 athletics) A large and bulky giant skeleton which still maintains animation through a deep curse, a great plague of death, or a nearby necromancer. Their lack of flesh and single minded aggression make these skeletons dangerous. Prioritizes nearest living creature. Dodges once per round, 5 feet backwards on the first instance of threat that doesn’t come from behind or diagonally behind.

macros.name: Great Axe (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. If this attack hits a shield, the shield takes 2d4 durability damage.

macros.name: Great Shield (Great Shield Protector tier3)
macros.description: Raise greatshield to defend over multiple rounds. Each proc deals 1 poise to self. Will not dodge while shield is raised unless poise is at 4 or more.

macros.name: And My Axe
macros.description: Reaction. Whenever a creature within Great Axe range is hit by another attack, may spend FP to make a reaction Great Axe attack against that same target.

macros.name: Revive (Inspiring Presence tier1)
macros.description: Slow action. Initiated on the skeleton's next turn after reaching 0 HP. When it resolves, the skeleton is fully healed. If its FP cost cannot be paid, the skeleton is destroyed. If it takes any damage before resolving, it is destroyed.

presets.name: Bone Mender Undead
presets.behavior: An undead which has been under the care of a Baigujin. Collects bones and bone shards to add to itself, other undead or monstrosities, and the Baigujin. Prioritizes defending the Beigujin by intercepting projectiles and deflecting attacks away from it. Can dodge once per round if not blocking a Baigujin, at the first instance of threat, toward the Baigujin (or directly away from threat otherwise).

macros.name: Bone Armor
macros.description: Stabs bone material over itself or another undead or monstrosity in range to increase their physical resistance and power (increasing X by one, up to max 4). Prioritizes a nearby Baigujin. If used on another creature, their physical resistance is increased by one tier up to max 100%.

macros.name: Protect (Shield Protector tier2)
macros.description: Reaction, once per round. Moves up to 15 feet to block a projectile from hitting a protected target (taking its damage instead), or to block a creature from moving within 5 feet. Prioritizes a nearby Baigujin.

macros.name: Explosion of Bone (X=1)
macros.description: 1d8 + 2 physical damage, 2 poise damage, 15 foot range, slow action. Explodes all Bone Armor stacks (X=1), hitting all grid spaces within range.

macros.name: Explosion of Bone (X=2)
macros.description: 2d8 + 4 physical damage, 4 poise damage, 15 foot range, slow action. Explodes all Bone Armor stacks (X=2), hitting all grid spaces within range.

macros.name: Explosion of Bone (X=3)
macros.description: 3d8 + 6 physical damage, 6 poise damage, 15 foot range, slow action. Explodes all Bone Armor stacks (X=3), hitting all grid spaces within range.

macros.name: Explosion of Bone (X=4)
macros.description: 4d8 + 8 physical damage, 8 poise damage, 15 foot range, slow action. Explodes all Bone Armor stacks (X=4), hitting all grid spaces within range.

presets.name: Ceaseless Excavator
presets.behavior: (+5 Athletics) A strange undead which has occupied its lost mind with the act of endless excavation. The residue of excavation often covers their flesh in a thick mat of rocky material. Each melee attack that hits this creature jars the attacker, causing them to take 1 poise damage. These undead can often be persuaded by other non human creatures with great will, into breaking down materials for them. Attacks any creature which interrupts its excavation, or is hostile to the creature it serves. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Rock Bash (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Deals +2 poise damage to shields.

macros.name: Rock Throw
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 1 poise damage, 25 foot range. Conjures a rock out of its hard skin and tosses it.

presets.name: Corrupted Vile Undead
presets.behavior: An advanced undead with pieces of cosmic flesh and human skin draped over itself as clothing. Has 2 AP of free movement on each of its turns. Dodges twice per round, 5 feet away from threat, when attacked from the front or sides by the first attack that threatens it. Prioritizes swarming the same target as others of its kind.

macros.name: Rapid Stabs (Sharp Rake tier1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Whenever this attack rolls maximum physical damage, its die explodes as in the Critical Rolls feat.

macros.name: Blood Flame
macros.description: (2d6 + Fai) fire damage, slow action, 30 foot range. Jumps up and launches a slash of blood flame toward a target, hitting it and both spaces left and right. Any creature hit also takes 1 bleed build up for each AP they spend on their next turn.

macros.name: Blood Vigor (Inspiring Presence tier1)
macros.description: Reaction. When a creature has been bled out within 60 feet, may add 1d4 damage to Rapid Stabs over the next ten minutes. Stacks with itself.

presets.name: Deathblight Touched Undead
presets.behavior: Undead which have been taken by the curse of the prince of death without succumbing to life after death. Often surrounded by black flies which seem to come in and out of existence. Prioritizes nearest target and is as hostile to live humans as any other type of undead. Dodges 5 feet forward when threatened from behind, at the first instance of threat in a round.

macros.name: Deaths Grasp (Pincushion Grab (curse) tier2)
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d2 curse build up at 5 foot range, then (2d6 + Fai) dark damage, 1d4 curse build up at 10 foot range. Two-part attack with spiny hand thrust followed by extending blackened roots.

macros.name: Pain
macros.description: (8d4) dark damage, slow action, audible range. Screams in bloodcurdling pain, dealing dark damage to all who can hear. Deals one less die for each grid space away. Adjacent creatures must DC 12 sanity check or be inflicted with frenzy for one round.

presets.name: Fallen of Rot
presets.behavior: An advanced undead which has been covered in so many rot blossoms that it has become noticeably larger in size. Its unclear how it maintains itself through the rot. Can spend 1 FP on the start of each of its turns in combat to heal for 3d10 HP. Prioritizes nearest non rot blossomed creature. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Fallen Swipe (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (6d6 + Fai) physical damage, 3d4 poison build up, 3d2 toxic build up, 10 foot range. Swipes at a target with long molding appendages.

macros.name: Cursed Rot
macros.description: 2d4 curse build up, 20 foot range. Once per round on this undead's turn. Any creature in range that is poisoned or badly poisoned instantly takes the curse build up.

macros.name: Degrade Life
macros.description: (10d4 + Fai) dark damage, slow action, 20 foot range. All non rot blossomed creatures within range take the damage. DC 18 fire keeping check or be infected by a permanent rot blossom.

presets.name: Fused
presets.behavior: An undead which has had its arms and head fuse with its upper body, into a featureless mound of dark leather. A rare undead which seems to have some connection to the formless mother. It stumbles as it moves erratically, swaying in confusion. Does not dodge. Prioritizes nearest human. When this undead is destroyed it bursts its fused torso and automatically activates its Burst Torso ability.

macros.name: Headbutt
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Swings its torso and head toward a creature. Any creature hit loses a portion of their flesh that made contact. This causes their max HP to also drop by the amount rolled until their next long rest or death. The Fused then heals for the amount rolled and regains all FP.

macros.name: Chest Spray
macros.description: (3d10 + Fai) fire damage, 3d4 toxic build up, 30 foot range. Opens a hole in its chest and sprays a line of puss and acid. Any creature hit has their dodge distance lowered by 5 feet for the next round. Can be made as a slow action for one extra AP to add 2d10 damage and change to a 20 foot cone.

macros.name: Pain
macros.description: Once per round. Lets out a metallic shriek, causing all non deafened creatures in audible range to lose 1d4 FP. DC 18 sanity or diplomacy check or be deafened for one round.

macros.name: Burst Torso
macros.description: (2d12 + Fai) fire damage, 3d4 poison build up, 2d4 toxic build up, 10 foot range. Only used upon death. Bursts its fused torso, threatening all creatures within 10 feet.

presets.name: Mind Stolen Undead
presets.behavior: Undead which have come to be from a human that has had their will, sanity, and life taken by a Lazarian from the river of minds. Seeks other live humans to absorb life from and be able to once again feed the hungry Lazarian. Has no regard for its well being and destroys its own form to accomplish this task. Can take 1d4 true damage whenever it is making a physical skill check, to add double the result to its check. Prioritizes the nearest live human and prioritizes grappling the target before all else. Can make a grapple attempt for 2 AP. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Flowing Flesh
macros.description: Reaction. Whenever a creature resists a grapple attempt, may leave behind sticky flesh. Roll 1d4 and take that as true damage, but lower the target's athletics and acrobatics by the same amount for 3 hours or until washed off.

macros.name: Absorb Life
macros.description: Slow action. When it resolves, any grappled creatures must make a DC (10 + twice their current exhaustion) vitality check or take one point of exhaustion.

macros.name: Unhinged Bite (Devour tier3)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 3 poise damage, can only target a grappled creature. Unhinges its jaw and bites down. This creature takes half of the damage dealt.

presets.name: Old Pursuer
presets.behavior: (+3 perception) Some say the Old Pursuers were once engineered to find and destroy all undead in a fallen kingdom. They wear full plate armor and their true forms remain obscured, but their human shape and demeanor give rise to the rumor that they themselves are a special form of undead. Often found to wield a massive slab greatsword and a circular metal greatshield. They float a few feet above the ground at all times. Prioritize nearby humans with a slight priority over those with higher undying stacks. Dodge up to three times per round for 1 FP by teleporting to an unoccupied space within 15 feet. They may also expend one of these teleports on their own turns to re position themselves, including before resolving a slow action. They dodge somewhat intelligently based on what they have seen in combat. They regenerate Int FP each round in combat.

macros.name: Great Sword (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + 3*Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Can be made as a slow action heavy attack for one extra AP. When buffed via Magical Pierce, deals an extra (2d12) magic damage and hits the space behind the target.

macros.name: Great Sword - Buffed
macros.description: Buffed version after Magical Pierce. (2d12 + 3*Str) physical damage and (2d12) magic damage. Hits the space directly behind the target as well.

macros.name: Raise Shield (Greatshield Protector tier3)
macros.description: Raise greatshield for one round. Blocks all physical and magic damage from all directions except directly and diagonally behind. Each proc deals 1 poise to self.

macros.name: Flying Slash (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (3d12 + 4*Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Flies forward up to two spaces before attacking. Creatures hit are pushed back one space. When buffed, also deals (2d12) magic damage and may fly four spaces.

macros.name: Flying Slash - Buffed
macros.description: Buffed version after Magical Pierce. (3d12 + 4*Str) physical and (2d12) magic damage. May fly forward four spaces.

macros.name: Magical Pierce
macros.description: (6d8 + 6*Int) magic damage, slow action, 10 foot range. Threatens all spaces in a line. DC 19 athletics or acrobatics check or take full damage and imbue the greatsword with a magical buff for three rounds. Success still takes half damage.

presets.name: Shambling Cursed Undead
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A decayed and withered undead that has been overwhelmed by Abyss that bubbles up from within. Moves very slow and only seeks to grab non undead and spread its curse. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Grab
macros.description: (2d4 + Str) physical damage, (2d4 + Fai) dark damage. Make a contested athletics check with a creature in 5 foot range. If they fail they are grappled and take the damage. Can ready this action.

macros.name: Explode (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: Reaction when reaching less than 10 HP. Becomes immune to all non true damage and status build up, charges a slow action. When it resolves, move 20 feet and explode dealing (1d10 + Fai) dark damage and 2d4 curse build up to all within 15 feet. This kills the undead.

presets.name: Shambling Flaming Undead
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A decayed and withered undead that shambles in restless flames. Moves very slow and only seeks to grab non undead and spread its flame. If hit with poison build up it beomes a Shambling Poison Undead. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Grab
macros.description: (3d4 + Str) fire damage. Make a contested athletics check with a creature in 5 foot range. If they fail they are grappled and take the damage. Can ready this action.

macros.name: Explode (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: Reaction when reaching less than 10 HP. Becomes immune to all non true damage and status build up, charges a slow action. When it resolves, move 20 feet and explode dealing (3d8 + Str) fire damage to all within 15 feet. This kills the undead.

presets.name: Shambling Poison Undead
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A decayed and withered undead. Its body is riddled with poison boils. Moves very slow and only seeks to grab non undead and spread its disease. If hit with fire damage it becomes a Shambling Flaming Undead. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Grab
macros.description: Make a contested athletics check with a creature in 5 foot range. If they fail they are grappled and take 3d4 poison build up. Can ready this action.

macros.name: Explode (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: Reaction when reaching less than 10 HP. Becomes immune to all non true damage and status build up, charges a slow action. When it resolves, move 20 feet and explode dealing (1d10 + Str) physical damage and 3d6 poison build up to all within 15 feet. This kills the undead.

presets.name: Skeleton
presets.behavior: (+3 acrobatics) A tall human skeleton which still maintains animation through a deep curse, a great plague of death, or a nearby necromancer. Their lack of flesh and single minded aggression make these skeletons extremely nimble. Prioritizes nearest living creature. Can dodge for only 1 AP, twice per round, 5 feet backwards on the first instance of threat that doesn’t come from behind or diagonally behind.

macros.name: Scimitar Slash (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. Move one free space in any direction after each use. The third instance on the same turn deals (3d6 + 2*Dex) physical damage instead.

macros.name: Scimitar Slash - Third Strike
macros.description: Third instance of Scimitar Slash on the same turn. (3d6 + 2*Dex) physical damage.

macros.name: Spinning Thrust
macros.description: (2d4 + Dex) physical damage, 2d4 bleed (or poison if rotted weapon) build up, 5 foot range. Spins its upper body, threatens all spaces in front and diagonally in front, then moves forward one space and repeats.

macros.name: Parry
macros.description: Whenever threatened by the same attack two times in a round, may parry the third instance. If the attack was melee, the attacker is staggered. Once per round.

macros.name: Revive (Inspiring Presence tier1)
macros.description: Slow action. Initiated on the skeleton's next turn after reaching 0 HP. When it resolves, the skeleton is fully healed. If its FP cost cannot be paid, the skeleton is destroyed. If it takes any damage before resolving, it is destroyed.

presets.name: Skeleton Archer
presets.behavior: (+6 precision) A tall human skeleton which still maintains animation through a deep curse, a great plague of death, or a nearby necromancer. Their lack of flesh and single minded aggression allow these skeletons to fire bone arrows with great accuracy. Prioritizes nearest living creature. Can dodge for only 1 AP, once per round, 5 feet backwards on the first instance of threat that doesn’t come from behind or diagonally behind.

macros.name: Arrow Shot (Let the Feast Begin tier3)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 60 foot range. The third instance on the same turn deals (2d6 + 1.5*Dex) physical damage and 2d4 bleed build up, and embeds a bone arrow inflicting a permanent random bodily status condition until removed for 3 AP (causing another 2d4 bleed).

macros.name: Arrow Shot - Third Strike
macros.description: Third instance of Arrow Shot on the same turn. (2d6 + 1.5*Dex) physical damage and 2d4 bleed build up. Embeds a bone arrow with permanent bodily status condition.

macros.name: Line of Fire
macros.description: (4d4 + 2*Dex) physical damage, 70 foot range. Fires multiple arrows striking a target and the two spaces closer and two spaces farther, forming a line.

macros.name: Intercept
macros.description: Whenever threatened by the same ranged attack two times in a round, may intercept any other instances of that ranged attack during the same round.

macros.name: Revive (Inspiring Presence tier1)
macros.description: Slow action. Initiated on the skeleton's next turn after reaching 0 HP. When it resolves, the skeleton is fully healed. If its FP cost cannot be paid, the skeleton is destroyed. If it takes any damage before resolving, it is destroyed.

presets.name: Timeworn Undead
presets.behavior: (-2 sanity) An undead which has lasted through centuries without falling or succumbing to a final death. It moves with unnatural speed and has lost all that once made it human. Prioritizes the nearest human. Dodges once per round, 10 feet, randomly left or right upon first threat. Whenever this undead dodges, it automatically uses its Rake and Bleed ability as a free reaction in front of itself.

macros.name: Rake and Bleed (Sharp Rake tier1)
macros.description: (2d12 + 3*Dex) physical damage, 2d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Threatens all spaces in front and diagonally in front.

macros.name: Inhuman Shuffle (*tier2)
macros.description: Move three spaces in an unnaturally fast shuffle.

macros.name: Thousand Cuts
macros.description: 10d10 physical damage, 10d2 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Slashes in a flurry threatening all spaces in front and diagonally in front.

macros.name: Wretched Blood
macros.description: 1d6 poison build up, 1d4 curse build up, slow action, 25 foot range. Sprays dark blood over a 10x10 foot area. Any creature hit takes the status build ups. The blood stays in those spaces, and any creature moving into or starting/ending their turn within takes the build up again.

presets.name: Undead Archer
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A basic human archer lost to undeath. Targets nearest non fully undead creature it can see or hear. Can dodge once per round, 5 foot distance, at first instance of being attacked from the front. Will randomly dodge left or right based on direction it faces.

macros.name: Arrow Shot
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 30/60 foot range if equipped with short/long bow. Can be charged to deal increased damage as normal, and 4 poise damage.

macros.name: Elemental Arrow Shot
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) magic or fire damage, 30/60 foot range if equipped with short/long bow. Can be charged to deal increased damage as normal, and 4 poise damage.

presets.name: Undead Giant
presets.behavior: (Athletics +5, Sanity -5) The fully undead form of a long lost race of giants. Does not dodge, and prioritizes farthest hostile human target.

macros.name: Trample
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage. Threatens any smaller creatures by moving into their grid spaces. Any creature hit is pushed one space away. Only used when moving towards priority target. No AP cost (movement-triggered).

macros.name: Large Swipe (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Becomes d12 if weapon equipped.

macros.name: Crushing Flurry
macros.description: (4d8 + 4*Str) physical damage, 7 poise damage, 5 foot range, slow action (becomes d12 if weapon equipped). Prioritized after a Large Swipe if enough AP remains. Hits all grid spaces in front.

presets.name: Undead Knight Spearman
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) An armored human spearman lost to undeath. Targets nearest non fully undead creature it can see or hear. Prioratizes defending with shield, but can dodge once per round, 5 foot distance, at first instance of being attacked from the front. Will randomly dodge left or right based on direction it faces.

macros.name: Spear (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Can be used to make heavy attack as normal.

macros.name: Great Shield (Great Shield Protector tier3)
macros.description: Raise great shield to block all physical. Each proc deals 1 poise to self. Can be held up for multiple rounds with no poise recovery.

macros.name: Power Thrust
macros.description: (1d12 + 2*Str) physical damage. Move forward one space and thrust far, hitting all spaces in a line up to 15 feet away.

presets.name: Undead Pyromancer
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A weak human pyromancer lost to undeath. Gains 1 FP when hit with fire damage. Targets nearest non fully undead creature it can see or hear. Otherwise does not move. Can dodge once per round, 5 foot distance, at first instance of being attacked from the front. Will randomly dodge left or right based on direction it faces.

macros.name: Fire Ball (Elemental Bolt tier1)(spell)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 15 foot range. Can be charged to hit all spaces adjacent to target and increase damage as normal.

macros.name: Fire Surge (spell)
macros.description: (2d2 + Int + Fai) fire damage per FP spent, 10 foot range. Hits all spaces up to its maximum range. FP cost is variable.

presets.name: Undead Soldier
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A basic human soldier lost to undeath. Loses 1 AP when taking fire damage. Targets nearest non fully undead creature it can see or hear. Otherwise does not move. Will prioritize using any equipped weapons. Can dodge once per round, 5 foot distance, at first instance of being attacked from the front. Will randomly dodge left or right based on direction it faces.

macros.name: Swipe
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range

macros.name: Sword (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (if equipped) (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range

macros.name: Flurry of Cuts (*tier1)
macros.description: (4d4 + 4*Str) physical damage, 4 poise damage, 5 foot range (becomes d6 if sword equipped). Slow action which is prioritized after a swipe or sword attack if enough AP remains. Hits all grid spaces in front.

macros.name: Shield (Shield Protector tier2)
macros.description: (If equipped) Raise shield to block all physical. Each proc deals 1 poise to self. GM clicks once per poise damage taken from blocked hit.

presets.name: Undead Sorcerer
presets.behavior: (-5 sanity) A weak human sorcerer lost to undeath. Loses 1 AP when taking fire damage. Targets nearest non fully undead creature it can see or hear. Otherwise does not move. Can dodge once per round, 5 foot distance, at first instance of being attacked from the front. Will randomly dodge left or right based on direction it faces.

macros.name: Soul Arrow (Elemental Bolt tier1)(spell)
macros.description: (1d4 + Int) magic damage, 20 foot range. Can be charged to increase range by 5 feet and increase damage as normal.

macros.name: Alvina Hail (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + 2*Int) magic damage, 15 foot range. Hits all spaces in a ten by ten area in range. Can be charged to increase range by 5 feet and increase damage as normal.

presets.name: Adult Nightbird (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: A large and rare creature of high intelligence and capacity for communi- cation. They resemble large corvids with black feathers and are a being of worship for the Corvian lineage. It is said some of the last surviving Night Birds were killed or lost after becoming targets for Dragons and other beings that wished to rule over land. Has full darkvision and can communicate telepathically over sight distance. Dodges up to three times per round, intelligently, up to 20 feet in any direction (including in flight). Prioritizes targets intelligently. Recovers 10 FP on any round where it lost less than 50 HP, otherwise recovers 3 FP.

macros.name: Seismic Toss (*tier4)
macros.description: (4d6 + Str + Dex) physical damage then (4d8) true damage, 10 foot range. Grabs at a target with talons. Any creature hit takes the first damage and must DC 24 athletics or acrobatics check or be flown up and slammed down for the second damage. Requires at least 20 feet of vertical space.

macros.name: Soul Spear (spell)
macros.description: (5d10 + 2*Int) magic damage, 40 foot range. Fires a large spear of soul magic. Can be charged to increase damage and pierce all targets up to maximum range.

macros.name: Soul Feathers (spell)
macros.description: (1d10 + Int) magic damage per feather, 30 foot range. Conjures five magical blue feathers which float above it. At any time as a reaction, may fire one feather at a target. Feathers act as a magical buff and can be dispelled.

presets.name: Adult Nightbird (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: A large and rare creature of high intelligence and capacity for communi- cation. They resemble large corvids with black feathers and are a being of worship for the Corvian lineage. It is said some of the last surviving Night Birds were killed or lost after becoming targets for Dragons and other beings that wished to rule over land. Has full darkvision and can communicate telepathically over sight distance. Dodges up to three times per round, intelligently, up to 20 feet in any direction (including in flight). Prioritizes targets intelligently. Recovers 10 FP on any round where it lost less than 50 HP, otherwise recovers 3 FP.

macros.name: Seismic Toss (*tier4)
macros.description: (4d6 + Str + Dex) physical damage then (4d8) true damage, 10 foot range. Grabs at a target with talons. Any creature hit takes the first damage and must DC 24 athletics or acrobatics check or be flown up and slammed down for the second damage. Requires at least 20 feet of vertical space.

macros.name: Soul Spear (spell)
macros.description: (5d10 + 2*Int) magic damage, 40 foot range. Fires a large spear of soul magic. Can be charged to increase damage and pierce all targets up to maximum range.

macros.name: Soul Feathers (spell)
macros.description: (1d10 + Int) magic damage per feather, 30 foot range. Conjures five magical blue feathers which float above it. At any time as a reaction, may fire one feather at a target. Feathers act as a magical buff and can be dispelled.

macros.name: Vow of Peace
macros.description: Slow action, 60 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Creates a lull in magic. When it resolves, all creatures in range with less than 10 knowledge of magics are silenced for one round. All creatures must DC 22 diplomacy check or be calmed and unable to take aggressive action for one round or until they lose HP. Cannot be interrupted by a dodge.

macros.name: Focus Armor
macros.description: Phase 2+ only. On any attack that dealt 30 or more damage (before resistances), may reduce the damage by (3d10 + 7).

macros.name: Soul Stream (spell)
macros.description: (10d10 + 3*Int) magic damage, 80 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Conjures a 10ft wide beam of pure soul magic threatening all creatures in a line. Every creature hit is pushed back 15 feet and knocked prone.

presets.name: Adult Nightbird (Phase 3)
presets.behavior: A large and rare creature of high intelligence and capacity for communi- cation. They resemble large corvids with black feathers and are a being of worship for the Corvian lineage. It is said some of the last surviving Night Birds were killed or lost after becoming targets for Dragons and other beings that wished to rule over land. Has full darkvision and can communicate telepathically over sight distance. Dodges up to three times per round, intelligently, up to 20 feet in any direction (including in flight). Prioritizes targets intelligently. Recovers 10 FP on any round where it lost less than 50 HP, otherwise recovers 3 FP.

macros.name: Seismic Toss (*tier4)
macros.description: (4d6 + Str + Dex) physical damage then (4d8) true damage, 10 foot range. Grabs at a target with talons. Any creature hit takes the first damage and must DC 24 athletics or acrobatics check or be flown up and slammed down for the second damage. Requires at least 20 feet of vertical space.

macros.name: Soul Spear (spell)
macros.description: (5d10 + 2*Int) magic damage, 40 foot range. Fires a large spear of soul magic. Can be charged to increase damage and pierce all targets up to maximum range.

macros.name: Soul Feathers (spell)
macros.description: (1d10 + Int) magic damage per feather, 30 foot range. Conjures five magical blue feathers which float above it. At any time as a reaction, may fire one feather at a target. Feathers act as a magical buff and can be dispelled.

macros.name: Vow of Peace
macros.description: Slow action, 60 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Creates a lull in magic. When it resolves, all creatures in range with less than 10 knowledge of magics are silenced for one round. All creatures must DC 22 diplomacy check or be calmed and unable to take aggressive action for one round or until they lose HP. Cannot be interrupted by a dodge.

macros.name: Focus Armor
macros.description: Phase 2+ only. On any attack that dealt 30 or more damage (before resistances), may reduce the damage by (3d10 + 7).

macros.name: Soul Stream (spell)
macros.description: (10d10 + 3*Int) magic damage, 80 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Conjures a 10ft wide beam of pure soul magic threatening all creatures in a line. Every creature hit is pushed back 15 feet and knocked prone.

macros.name: Bent Time (spell)
macros.description: Once per round, 50 foot range. Phase 3 only. Choose one creature to DC 23 sanity check or be temporarily banished from time. Banished creatures reappear one round later. Creatures rolling less than 11 are banished for 1d4 years.

presets.name: Bearbug
presets.behavior: (+4/+8 athletics) A hulking thick bug with molten carapace. Will seek to block passages with its body to decrease airflow and increase heat around it and any nearby Bearbug Queen dens. Found in hot places, deeper into the ground, or around Molten Spiders. Does not dodge, but once per round may use its Tackle ability as a free reaction when attacked from the front in melee range (this does not cancel slow actions). Prioritizes nearest creature, or staying still and blocking a path. Medium sized Bearbugs are more aggressive and will actively move out of their locations to pursue foes.

macros.name: Tackle (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, (1d4 + Fai) fire damage, 5 foot range. Juts forward and threatens a creature with a body tackle. Can be used as a free reaction once per round when attacked from the front in melee range.

macros.name: Fire Spit
macros.description: (3d2 + Fai) fire damage, 2 poise damage, 10 foot range, slow action. Spit a line of heavy earthen flames. DC 12 athletics or acrobatics check or be knocked prone.

presets.name: Bearbug Queen
presets.behavior: (+8 athletics) A massive bug with molten carapace and birthing tubes connected through nearby caves. Its young live within birthing tubes and grow until ready to leave and create more tunnel heat. Found in deep places where young have increased heat. Does not dodge and is unable to move. Prioritizes nearest creature.

macros.name: Tackle (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, (1d6 + Fai) fire damage, 10 foot range. Shifts weight and threatens all spaces in range in one direction.

macros.name: Fire Spit
macros.description: (4d6 + Fai) fire damage, 6 poise damage, 25 foot range, slow action. Extends proboscis and spits a 10 foot thick line of heavy earthen flames. DC 7 athletics or acrobatics check or be knocked prone. Can leave molten rock dealing 1d4 fire to creatures moving into those spaces.

macros.name: Birth Young
macros.description: Create 1d2 medium sized Bearbug creatures from birthing tubes. Only usable once per round.

macros.name: Consume Young
macros.description: Can beckon a smaller Bearbug to come into range. Consume it and regain 3 FP.

presets.name: Coral Panther
presets.behavior: A large cat native to warmer environments with long prehensile whiskers of plate like material. Hunts in social groups of similar colored fur markings, which vary from location to location and pack to pack. Prioritizes attacking the same creature as its pack, or the visibly weakest target otherwise. Dodges 5 feet away at the first threat from the front or sides, twice per round.

macros.name: Claw Slash (Sharp Rake tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 5d2 bleed build up, 5 foot range.

macros.name: Whisker Lash
macros.description: (1d2) physical damage, 10 foot range. After Charge ability, the next two uses deal (2d2 + Fai) lightning damage instead.

macros.name: Whisker Lash - Charged
macros.description: (2d2 + Fai) lightning damage, 10 foot range. Empowered version after Charge, usable twice.

macros.name: Charge
macros.description: (3d6 + Fai) lightning damage, 15 foot range, slow action. When it resolves, all non Coral Panther creatures within 15 feet are threatened by a lightning eruption. This slow action is not canceled by dodge actions.

presets.name: Crebine Vulture
presets.behavior: A carrion creature that flies among desolate wastes looking for life to consume. They are very quick and nimble in flight and prefer to swoop down to peck and claw at other creatures which are already in danger. Do not dodge, but will fly up before and after attacks to avoid direct confrontation.

macros.name: Talon Rake
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage. Swoops 15 feet horizontally and up to 30 feet down before threatening an adjacent space. After the attack resolves, may move up to 15 feet horizontally and up to 30 feet back up.

macros.name: Blood Vomit
macros.description: 1d6 poison build up, 1d4 bleed build up, 25 foot range. Puke a sticky mixture of blood and bile in a straight line, which falls to the ground threatening all spaces.

macros.name: Peck
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, threatening an adjacent space. Can be made directly before the escape portion of Talon Rake.

presets.name: Crystal Butterfly Lizard
presets.behavior: A lesser wyrm with crystalline butterfly like wings. Its body resembles a lizard with almost transparent skin. Can fly, and dodges once per round intelligently, 5 feet in any direction. Prioritizes moving in to pester threats before fluttering away to safety or destroying them with its rain.

macros.name: Thick Crystal Rain (spell)
macros.description: (2d8 + Int) magic damage, 30 foot range, 15x15 foot AOE. Flutters wings to conjure jagged crystal rain. Each creature hit is inflicted with limb break on one limb (roll d4) for one round.

macros.name: Crystal Pebble (Elemental Bolt tier1)(spell)
macros.description: (1d2 + Int) magic damage, 25 foot range. Can pierce through one creature and continue. Charging allows it to ricochet off the first target toward a second.

macros.name: Wall of Crystal
macros.description: 10 round duration, 30 foot range. Conjures a wall of crystal: 3 feet deep, 10 feet tall, 15 feet long. Blocks all movement, physical attacks and projectiles, but allows elemental projectiles to pass. Crumbles at end of duration. Does not appear where obstructed.

presets.name: Crystal Crab
presets.behavior: A crab of great proportion. Is found in salty waters of all temperatures where it cultivates hard crystal upon its back. Often found around other oceanic creatures to scavenge off of their prey. If it cannot reach a hostile creature with its other attacks, or has just enough AP remaining, then it prioritizes defending itself with its Crystal Shell ability. Can dodge twice per round either left or right away from threat, or randomly if the threat is equal. dodges a five foot distance at the first instance of melee range threat.

macros.name: Stab'n Grab
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) physical, (1d4 + Dex) physical, (2d4 + Str) physical damage, each at 5 foot range. Two quick stabs with left claw, followed by a grab and crush with right. Moves one space between each attack. Creatures hit by the grab are inflicted with limb fracture on one leg for one round.

macros.name: Crystal Spray
macros.description: (2d6) magic damage, 15 foot range. Hits all in a cone. Creatures hit have hard crystal grow on them, causing the locked up status condition for one round.

macros.name: Crystal Shell (Shield Protector tier2)
macros.description: Turns its back to the nearest threat and tucks behind its crystalline back. During the next round, the Crystal Crab gains one tier of resistance to all forms of damage. Can still dodge after using this ability.

presets.name: Crystalline Gecko
presets.behavior: (Stealth +5) A shiny and alluring reptile that hides valuables within its body. Hides until it feels like it has been noticed, at which point it sprints away from any and all nearby creatures. If there are no creatures within 20 feet then it seeks to disappear using its Transparency ability. Can dodge once per round for no AP cost, 10 feet forward when attacked from behind.

macros.name: Transparency
macros.description: Slow action. The Gecko gyrates its body and starts to become fully transparent. When this ability resolves, the Gecko disappears and teleports to a distant location.

macros.name: Treasure (Attention Grabbing Annoyance tier2)
macros.description: When this creature is killed it drops the treasure it contained. Usually a few rare items and materials, but can also be a ring/adornment or even a small weapon.

presets.name: Demi Human
presets.behavior: A strange beast which resembles a human, and even has rudimentary intelligence. Usually lives in small tribes and attacks nearby creatures and people for food and things that interest them. Prioritizes using their small makeshift shields, but will dodge backwards 5 feet at the first threat from the front when not defending. Will prioritize attacking a target that one other Demi Human is also attacking (focus on attacking in pairs).

macros.name: Bash (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage. A quick bash with a club, threatening an adjacent target.

macros.name: Protect (Shield Protector tier2)
macros.description: Raise a small wooden shield which blocks damage like a regular shield. Each proc deals 1 poise to self. Every second attack on their shield may be countered by a Bash as a reaction for free.

macros.name: Scream
macros.description: Scream and alert nearby Demi Humans in earshot. All Demi Humans within 10 feet also use this as a free reaction. Non demi humans within 10 feet must DC 10 sanity or diplomacy check or be deafened for one round. Deafened creatures that fail also become dazed for one round and take 3 poise damage.

presets.name: Demi Human Chief
presets.behavior: (+3 athletics) A Chieftain of a small group of Demi Humans. Consid- erably larger and hairier then the others, and possesses a strange affinity for weak crystal sorcery. Will dodge randomly backwards, or left, or right, 10 feet at the first threat from the front (prioritizing directions which are not obstructed). Will target creatures that are nearest during combat.

macros.name: Great Bash (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical damage, 4 poise damage, 10 foot range. An overhead bash with a large club.

macros.name: Crystal Rain (spell)
macros.description: (2d4) magic damage, 25 foot range, 10x10 foot AOE. Performs a strange dance which conjures crystal rain in an area.

macros.name: Scream
macros.description: Scream loudly and alert nearby Demi Humans in earshot. All Demi Humans within 15 feet also use this as a free reaction. Non demi humans within 15 feet must DC 14 sanity or diplomacy check or be deafened for one round. Deafened creatures that fail also become dazed for one round and take 3 poise damage.

presets.name: Demi Human Queen
presets.behavior: (+3 athletics and perception) The head of multiple groups of Demi Hu- man in the area. Much larger than even a Demi Human Chief, and possesses a strange affinity for some crystal sorcery. Does not dodge. Will target creatures that are nearest during combat. Regains 1d4 FP whenever a hostile creature is deafened by a Demi Human Scream ability

macros.name: Bash (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage. An overhead bash with a staff, threatening an adjacent target.

macros.name: Crystal Burst (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int) magic damage, 25 foot range cone. Spray a bursting blue crystal threatening all creatures in a cone.

macros.name: Crystal Rain (spell)
macros.description: (2d8) magic damage, 40 foot range, 15x15 foot AOE. Performs a strange dance which conjures crystal rain.

macros.name: Scream
macros.description: Scream loudly and alert nearby Demi Humans in earshot. All Demi Humans within 25 feet also use this as a free reaction. Non demi humans within 20 feet must DC 16 sanity or diplomacy check or be deafened for one round. Deafened creatures that fail also become dazed for one round and take 3 poise damage.

presets.name: Elder Mole Worm
presets.behavior: (+4 athletics) A large worm like creature which burrows through hard rock using its crushing mouths. Both ends of the worm have a mouth like opening with tentacles around it, which it uses to grab onto more nutritious prey that finds itself nearby. Burrows out of the ground to attack, and creates difficult terrain in all spaces within 10 feet of itself when surfaced. Can move by burrowing, and remains out of sight until it surfaces again to attack. Does not dodge. Is blind but has 60 feet of tremor sense. Prioritizes larger creatures, or the nearest/loudest creature in the area.

macros.name: Boulder Heave
macros.description: (2d8 + Str) physical damage, 25 foot range. Explodes on impact also dealing its damage to all spaces within 10 feet of target.

macros.name: Suction Grab (Crushing Hold tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Reaches out with mouth tentacles. Contested athletics check or be restrained and inflicted with locked up upon escape.

macros.name: Poisoned Regurgitation (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: Pukes out digested material in a 20 foot cone. All creatures hit take 2d6 poison build up, or 2d6 toxic if the worm has recently eaten a living thing.

macros.name: Digest (Devour tier3)
macros.description: (3d10 + 3*Str) physical damage, 3d6 poison build up, slow action. Initiated when restraining a creature. When resolving, if creature is still restrained, they are brought into the body and restrained until the worm is killed. Creatures within take this damage each turn and may suffocate.

presets.name: Fire Wyrm
presets.behavior: A lesser Fire Wyrm. Not at fearsome and powerful as its dragon coun- terpart, but still poses a significant threat. At the start of initiative, each creature hostile to this one must make a DC 10 diplomacy check or be weakened with fright, causing them to have -5 on all acrobatics or athletics checks until combat ends. Does not dodge, but can fly. Prioritizes attacking threats somewhat intelligently.

macros.name: Fire Breath
macros.description: (4d8 + 2*Int + 2*Fai) fire damage, 30 foot range. Hits all grid spaces in a cone.

macros.name: Tackling Bite (Crushing Hold tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. Lunges up to ten feet forward before biting. Medium or smaller creatures hit are inflicted with locked up for one round.

presets.name: Giant Bat
presets.behavior: A massive bat that lives in abundant darkness. Seeks the blood of larger creatures, and disorients creatures with high focus. Dodges at the first audible threat, five feet up into the air. Prioritizes the closest target.

macros.name: Flapping Bite (Leaping Bite tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 2d4 bleed build up. Bites an adjacent target. If hit, the bat leaps backwards 10 feet for free. If dodged, leaps 5 feet toward the dodging creature.

macros.name: Sonic Shock (Attention Grabbing Annoyance tier2)
macros.description: (2d2) physical damage, 25 foot range. Concentrated burst of sound in a line, threatening the first creature in its path. If dodged, threatens the next. Any creature hit that can hear also takes their current FP as true damage.

presets.name: Giant Lobster
presets.behavior: (+7 perception) A massive crustacean that is found near the shores of the ocean. Fires its Water Jet ability at unsuspecting prey on the shore and is known to be extremely aggressive, dangerous, and deceptively fast. Often has its carapace occupied by a number of Crystal Crabs that fight alongside it for a share of its food. Prioritizes nearest creature which it has deemed to be prey (or as otherwise stated by its abilities). Dodges once per round at the first instance of threat, 10 feet backwards for only 1 AP.

macros.name: Stab and Claw (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical then (4d12 + 2*Str) physical, 10 foot range. Stabs with a sharp claw hitting all spaces up to target, then grabs with crushing claw in a sweeping arc. Repeats two additional times against other targets in range.

macros.name: Jump Slam
macros.description: (3d12 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Jumps into the air and slams both claws, hitting both spaces in front. Only used if a creature is in range at the start of its turn or after another ability.

macros.name: Water Jet
macros.description: (6d6 + Dex) physical damage, 80 foot range. Once per round, shoots a high pressure stream of water at the furthest target in range. Creatures hit are drenched.

presets.name: Giant Rat
presets.behavior: A bulbous rat of great proportion. Moves two spaces per turn for no AP cost toward the nearest hostile target. If there is no hostile target in sight then the rat will seek to hide in ambush. Can dodge once per round, 5 foot distance, at the first instance of being attacked. Will always dodge backwards based on the direction it is facing.

macros.name: Bite
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d4 poison build up, 5 foot range.

macros.name: Leaping Bite (*tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 poison build up. Leap up to two spaces and bite down on a creature within 5 feet. Used only if target is not in range of Bite after free movement.

presets.name: Goat Man
presets.behavior: A tall humanoid beast covered in fur and walking on hoofed hind legs. Its head is masked by a myriad of twisted horns, and its hands forming long slashing claws. Prioritizes nearest creature by running at them aggressively, mauling and then kicking them to death. Dodges twice per round by leaping backwards 5 feet at the first instance of threat. If they are threatened in melee range while they still have a dodge, then this beast may kick at its attacker as a reaction in addition to its dodge. This kick deals the damage of one of its Kick attacks as below.

macros.name: Kick
macros.description: (2d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Leaps up and kicks at a target, also threatening the space behind them if they dodge. DC 16 sanity or diplomacy check or be dazed for one round.

macros.name: Grab and Maul (Pincushion Grab tier2)
macros.description: (4d6 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 4d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Jumps and grabs at a nearby creature with a hand to hand grapple (athletics contest). If target fails they take the damage and this beast becomes empowered with their blood for one minute. While empowered, the Goat Man may sprint continuously while performing other actions and use Kick for one less AP.

presets.name: Gold Sigil Bear
presets.behavior: An overgrown bear with a gold pattern across the fur of its back. Said by some to be touched by the world tree. A calm beast, but one that can become very aggressive when someone disturbs it or comes between it and its food. Regenerates 1d6 HP at the start of its turns in combat when exposed to the light of day. Dodges at the first instance of threat, once per round, 10 feet backwards based on the direction it faces. Prioritizes the closest target, otherwise the weakest looking target.

macros.name: Claw Slam (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d12 + Str) physical damage, 1d10 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Slams claws on a grid space. DC 19 athletics or acrobatics check or be knocked prone.

macros.name: Crushing Hold (*tier2)
macros.description: (2d8 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Grabs at a creature in range. Any creature hit is grappled. The bear may still attack normally when grappling. Upon escaping, targets are inflicted with locked up for one round.

macros.name: Building Aggression (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical, (1d8 + Dex) physical, (1d10 + Str) physical, (4d8 + Fai) lightning damage, each 5 foot range. Can move 5 feet between each attack. First three attacks hit grid spaces left and right of target. Last attack hits all within 10 feet. Only usable when a creature in range is prone, grappled, or locked up.

presets.name: Horned Strider
presets.behavior: A massive lumbering creature found in swamps and tundra. Covers itself with moss or snow and stands on two legs. Head adorned with many horns, carries a makeshift staff of a fallen tree or large icicle. Seeks to consume the anger and fear of creatures in its territory. Prioritizes nearest target or most grouped area. Does not dodge. Anytime during combat that a hostile creature expresses fear, anger, or is killed, this beast regains 3d6 HP and 2d4 FP.

macros.name: Staff Slam (Poison)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 2d6 poison build up, 15 foot range. Swings makeshift staff, threatening a 10x10 foot area.

macros.name: Staff Slam (Toxic)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 2d6 toxic build up, 15 foot range. Swings makeshift staff, threatening a 10x10 foot area.

macros.name: Staff Slam (Frost)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 2d6 frost build up, 15 foot range. Swings makeshift staff, threatening a 10x10 foot area.

macros.name: Vengeful Spirits (Skull Wisp Spawn tier3)
macros.description: (4d4 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 40 foot range. When using Staff Slam, may spend FP to summon two volleys of ethereal red skulls. One flies at a target in range. The second hovers and flies on the next turn. Hovering volleys stack.

macros.name: Muddy Cascade - Poison (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, (3d6 + Int + Fai) magic damage, 3d4 poison build up, slow action, 30 foot range. Sloshes body causing a radial wave of mud/ice. DC 18 athletics check or be knocked prone.

macros.name: Muddy Cascade - Toxic (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, (3d6 + Int + Fai) magic damage, 3d4 toxic build up, slow action, 30 foot range. DC 18 athletics check or be knocked prone.

macros.name: Muddy Cascade - Frost (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, (3d6 + Int + Fai) magic damage, 3d4 frost build up, slow action, 30 foot range. DC 18 athletics check or be knocked prone.

macros.name: Absorb
macros.description: 30 foot range. Pulls back all mud/ice. All creatures within range must DC 16 athletics check or be pulled up to three spaces toward this creature. For each creature pulled, regains 1d2 FP. Only usable directly after Muddy Cascade resolves.

presets.name: Kirin of the Fog
presets.behavior: (+5 perception, +2 precision, +3 diplomacy) A blue and white steed with chitinous notches on its joins and a horn on its head which crackles with electricity. A somewhat rare creature that is said to bring bad weather in its wake, but is able to see clearly through it. Whenever a Kirin of the Fog is within a 50 km area, the weather changes to either fog, heavy fog, or a blizzard windstorm depending on its proximity to the observer. Prioritizes dashing in from the obscuring weather and pestering prey which has been caught without shelter, before galloping back into the fog and haze. Dodges up to three times per round, 10 feet away from threat, for 1 AP each. Is able to sprint while performing its abilities and other actions on its turn.

macros.name: Cold Lightning Spear (spell)
macros.description: (4d8 + Fai) lightning damage, 1d4 frost build up, 40 foot range. Conjures a cold spear of lightning from its horn. Used when the Kirin believes it must defend itself.

macros.name: Trample (X=1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=1 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=2)
macros.description: (2d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=2 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=3)
macros.description: (3d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=3 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=4)
macros.description: (4d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=4 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=5)
macros.description: (5d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=5 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=6)
macros.description: (6d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=6 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=7)
macros.description: (7d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=7 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=8)
macros.description: (8d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=8 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=9)
macros.description: (9d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=9 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=10)
macros.description: (10d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=10 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=11)
macros.description: (11d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=11 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Trample (X=12)
macros.description: (12d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. X=12 (number of times used this turn). Rears hooves and tramples a nearby target before jumping back 10 feet.

macros.name: Pale Hunger
macros.description: DC 14 vitality check or be stricken with hunger and weakness. If they do not eat and rest within a few minutes they gain a point of exhaustion. Used while pestering and trampling victims.

presets.name: Large Land Octopus
presets.behavior: (+2 athletics, +4 stealth) A large tangled mass of tentacles. Often found near water around their smaller variety and can move through water with no speed penalty. Will seek to ambush prey while hidden before fighting. Can spend 1 FP to heal 3d6 HP by eating one of its own tentacles. Does not dodge, but has advantage to resist being moved and grappled.

macros.name: Wrap (Crushing Hold tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + 2*Str) physical damage, 15 foot range. Cannot be dodged if target cannot see this creature. DC 15 athletics or acrobatics check or be grappled. Grappled creatures take this damage at the start of each turn.

macros.name: Thrash (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical, (1d8 + Dex) physical, (2d10 + 2*Str) physical damage. Moving forward 5 feet between each attack. Flails limbs and targets any grid space within 10 feet before jumping and making a final slam. Grappled creatures are moved along and automatically take damage.

macros.name: Acidic Puke Up
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical damage, 1d4 poison build up, 1d4 durability loss to all equipment, 10 foot range. Hits all spaces in a line. Using this on a grappled creature doubles poison and durability loss.

presets.name: Minotaur
presets.behavior: A large ”ancient” demon that roams hot climates and charges at anything smaller than it that it might deem as prey. Targets nearest creature in charge range before circling back and charging again. Attempts to grapple (for 2 AP) more nimble creatures which escape its charge, and is able to still attack creatures it grapples. Dodges when attacked from the sides or behind, once per round, 5 feet directly away from the threat before turning to face it.

macros.name: Charge (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage. Moves 4 spaces before making an attack on an adjacent space. DC 17 athletics check or be pushed back 10 feet.

macros.name: Axe (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Threatens a creature in range with a giant weapon.

macros.name: Axe Opportunity
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, reaction. When a creature moves or is moved away from the Minotaur out of an adjacent space in front or diagonally in front, make a reaction attack. If half HP or less, this also stops the target and they lose any resources spent to move.

presets.name: Mole Worm
presets.behavior: (+2 athletics) A strange worm like creature which burrows through hard rock using its crushing mouths. Both ends of the worm have a mouth like opening with tentacles around it, which it uses to grab onto more nutritious prey that finds itself nearby. Burrows out of the ground to attack, and creates difficult terrain in all spaces within 5 feet of itself when surfaced. Can move by burrowing, and remains out of sight until it surfaces again to attack. Does not dodge. Is blind but has 60 feet of tremor sense. Prioritizes larger creatures, or the nearest/loudest creature in the area.

macros.name: Boulder Heave
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical damage, 15 foot range. Explodes on impact also dealing its damage to all spaces within 5 feet of target.

macros.name: Suction Grab (Crushing Hold tier2)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Reaches out with mouth tentacles. Contested athletics check or be grappled and inflicted with locked up upon escape.

macros.name: Digest (Devour tier3)
macros.description: (3d6 + 3*Str) physical damage, 3d6 poison build up, slow action. Initiated when grappling a creature. When resolving, if creature is still grappled, they are brought into the body and restrained until the worm is killed. Creatures within take this damage each turn and may suffocate.

presets.name: Molten Spider
presets.behavior: (+3 acrobatics) A very large spider covered in hard molten rock to protect itself and keep warm. Can climb freely along walls. Seeks to slow down and hinder the movement of its prey. Dodges at the first threat, diagonally backwards left or right away from danger, 10 feet, once per round. Prioritizes slowed creatures, followed by nearby creatures.

macros.name: Oil Spit
macros.description: 20 foot range. Spit a wave of slick oil in a 10x10 foot line. Area becomes difficult terrain for one hour. DC 14 athletics or acrobatics check or be inflicted with locked up for one round. DC 8 acrobatics to move into oiled spaces or be knocked prone.

macros.name: Giant Bite
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. Leap up to 10 feet toward a hostile creature before attacking.

macros.name: Fire Burst
macros.description: (1d8 + Fai) fire damage, 20 foot range. Targets and threatens a creature. If the target space has Molten Spider Oil, it is ignited as per the Molten Spider Infant Ignite ability.

presets.name: Molten Spider Infant
presets.behavior: (+3 acrobatics) A human sized spider covered in hard molten rock to protect itself and keep warm. Has 2 free spaces of movement each turn, and can climb along walls. Seeks to slow down and hinder the movement of its prey. Dodges at the first threat, diagonally backwards left or right away from danger, 5 feet, once per round. Prioritizes slowed creatures, followed by nearby creatures.

macros.name: Oil Spit
macros.description: 25 foot range. Spit slick oil over a 10x10 foot area. Area becomes difficult terrain for one hour. DC 14 athletics or acrobatics check or be inflicted with locked up for one round. DC 8 acrobatics to move into oiled spaces or be knocked prone.

macros.name: Leaping Bite (*tier1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. Leap up to 10 feet toward a hostile creature before attacking.

macros.name: Ignite
macros.description: (2d6 + Fai) fire damage, 15 foot range. Target a grid space affected by Oil Spit and ignite all adjacent oiled spaces. Creatures hit or moving into the spaces take the damage. Stays aflame for ten rounds.

presets.name: Mud Pisacha
presets.behavior: A snake like creature which feats primarily on live human flesh. Hides within muddy and shallow areas of warm climate with groups of others in order to ambush people that cross its path. Focuses the nearest prey. Dodges 10 feet left or right away from the first instance of threat in a round.

macros.name: Impale (Pincushion Grab tier2)
macros.description: (2d8 + 2*Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Hand to hand grapple attempt on an adjacent creature. If it succeeds, impale them with a spiked appendage. Can use on already grappled or restrained creatures without additional grapple attempt.

macros.name: Mud Burst
macros.description: (2d6 + Fai) physical damage, 15 foot range cone. Sprays thick digested mud. Creatures hit have disadvantage to athletics over the next round.

presets.name: Multi-eyed Oni
presets.behavior: (+5 perception, +5 precision) A large yeti like being covered in thick white fur and with a head that has one large central eye on its back and front. The creatures head turns to keep multiple targets in sight. At the end of its turn, each creature it is directly looking at (directly in front or behind in sight range) takes 2d4 frost build up. Can dodge once per round, five feet forward or back, at the first instance of threat.

macros.name: Palm Smash
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 1d6 frost build up, 10 foot range. Slams its three fingered hand down, hitting the target space as well as the spaces left, right, and behind it.

macros.name: Grab and Eat
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical then (3d6 + 2*Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Grabs at a target. If hit, victim takes first damage and must DC 16 athletics check or be bitten for second damage. This creature heals 3d6 HP on bite.

macros.name: Frozen Tears
macros.description: (3d8) magic damage, 3d4 frost build up, slow action, 35 foot range. Scatter shards of frozen crystal tears in a line toward the two opposite directions this creature faces. Can be used for free as a reaction when first hitting half HP or less.

presets.name: Petrifying Fly
presets.behavior: A tiny fly formed from a blight of death. Can occupy the same grid space as any other creature. Searches out humans to curse and create more flies from their death. Can only be killed at 0 HP when wings are destroyed (DC 18 precision attack or area of effect damage). When three flies occupy the same space as another creature, they produce one Fly King monstrosity. Dodges up to four times per round, one space, for 0 AP. Prioritizes nearest human, or human closest to death, or human with other Flies already within their grid space.

macros.name: Spread Death
macros.description: (1d2) poison build up, 0 foot range. Deals poison build up to any creature sharing the same grid space. Each target already poisoned instead takes the amount in curse build up.

macros.name: Annoying Distress (Attention Grabbing Annoyance tier1)
macros.description: Whenever this creature occupies the same space as another and is threatened, the creature sharing the space is also threatened. Whenever this creature dodges, it heals 1 HP and the attacker must DC 13 acrobatics check or take 1d4 true damage as they stumble.

presets.name: Pin Whip Foliage
presets.behavior: (+6 stealth) A living bush which hides in ambush. Prioritizes nearest creature and does not dodge.

macros.name: Branch Swipe (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Swipes with a spiny branch.

macros.name: Pincushion Grab (*tier2)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 1d6 poison build up, 10 foot range. Grab and threaten a creature. DC 12 acrobatics check or be restrained and continue taking damage each round.

presets.name: Plains Rooster
presets.behavior: A massive rooster with long white and red feathers, and a tail which sweeps the ground behind it. It wanders easily accessible areas attempting to forage, scavenge and hunt for food (plants and smaller animals). It attempts to hide itself poorly and can be very oblivious to its surroundings, but becomes extremely ag- gressive when surprised or approached by something smaller. Prioritizes the nearest creature smaller than itself after becoming aggressive. Dodges once per round, 5 feet upwards, before gliding back down into its spaces.

macros.name: Peck
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Quickly pecks at a nearby space. AP cost reduced to 1 when at half HP or less.

macros.name: Claw (Sharp Rake tier1)
macros.description: (3d4 + Dex) physical damage, 3d4 bleed build up, 10 foot range. Leaps upwards and claws at a target space.

macros.name: Tail Flare (Elemental Slam tier2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) fire damage, 10 foot range. Sweeps its tail in a 180 degree arc behind itself causing flames. Threatens all creatures within the arc. Only used when a hostile creature is directly behind it.

presets.name: Rock Basilisk
presets.behavior: (+3 stealth) A strange lizard of faded complexion and large false eyes on either side of its dead. Found near rocky terrain and growths of deathroot. Feeds on humans by inflicting them with curse and feeding on the stone and deathroot deposits formed upon death. Prioritizes the nearest human. Dodges once per round, 5 feet backwards when attacked from the front or sides. Whenever this creature dodges, it spits a small cloud of curse in the space in front of it as it leaps back. The cloud behaves like the clouds formed from the creatures Cursed Cloud ability.

macros.name: Root Bite (Leaping Bite tier1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) physical damage, 1d2 curse build up, 5 foot range. Whenever this ability deals damage, this creature regains 1 FP.

macros.name: Cursed Spray
macros.description: 1d4 curse build up, 20 foot range. Spray a fleeting curse forward threatening all spaces in a line.

macros.name: Cursed Cloud (Status Spray tier2 (toxic))
macros.description: 1d6 curse build up, 5 foot range. Spit a 10x10 foot cloud of deathblight and curse, then leap one space. Creatures moving into or starting their turn in the spaces take curse build up. Cloud lasts 1 minute, dispersed by strong wind or heavy rain.

presets.name: Rotten Foot
presets.behavior: (+5 athletics) A large pustule of rotten growths which moves slowly on a lower pad. Sprays a thick putrid fume and slams into threats. Eats organic material to decompose into further rot. Does not dodge, cannot see. Prioritizes nearest threat based on ground feel. If knocked prone it loses all natural physical protection.

macros.name: Putrid Mist (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: 2d6 poison build up, 2d4 toxic build up, 15 foot range. Shake and spray a mist of potent poison. Threatens all spaces within range.

macros.name: Growth Slam
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, threatens an adjacent space.

presets.name: Sailor's Foot
presets.behavior: (+5 athletics) A large pustule of oceanic growths which moves slowly on a lower pad. Sprays putrid fume and slams into threats. Eats organic material, attracted to ships in shallow waters. Other oceanic life often use it as refuge. Does not dodge, cannot see. Prioritizes nearest threat based on ground feel. If knocked prone it loses all natural physical protection.

macros.name: Putrid Mist (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) fire damage, 2d4 poison build up, 1d4 durability damage to armor, 10 foot range. Shake and spray a burning mist of poison that quickly falls to the ground. Threatens all spaces within range.

macros.name: Growth Slam
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, threatens an adjacent space.

presets.name: Sand Leviathan Infant
presets.behavior: Infants of the great sand leviathan Obscuro. They are much smaller, but retain their ability to burrow and are covered in sharp scales which can protrude out during battle to cut at their foes. They have a relentless hunger and will attack most other medium or small creatures which they come across. Prioritizes smaller creatures in battle first, or the nearest threat. Can dodge twice per round, 5 feet, diagonally toward the threatening creature left or right, at the first instance of threat from melee range. Dodges left or right at the first instance of ranged threat

macros.name: Bite
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical damage, 1d2 durability damage to armor or shield hit, 5 foot range. Bites down with serrated teeth and acidic saliva.

macros.name: Constrict
macros.description: (3d4 + Str) physical damage, 5d2 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Wraps around and constricts. DC 16 athletics check or be grappled and take this damage and bleed each turn until escape.

macros.name: Scale Spines
macros.description: (1d2 + 0.5*Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Movement-triggered. Whenever the sand leviathan infant takes a move action ending within range of another creature, that creature takes the damage.

macros.name: Acid Spit
macros.description: (2d6 + Dex) fire damage, 2d2 durability damage to all equipment, 15 foot range. Spits a line of acidic saliva, threatening all grid spaces in a line.

presets.name: Sleeping Rooroo
presets.behavior: A large mound of spiraling fur. It seems to form over top of valuables that have been still for a long period. It is said that a Sleeping Rooroo which twitches too often will rise and bring misfortune to those that woke it. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Sleep Twitch
macros.description: Twitches in its sleep. Uses this ability as a reaction to being attacked and taking damage.

presets.name: Small Land Octopus
presets.behavior: (+2 athletics, +4 stealth) A small tangled mass of tentacles. Often found near water or hidden in brush and can move through water with no speed penalty. Will seek to ambush prey while hidden before fighting. Can spend 1 FP to heal 1d6 HP by eating one of its own tentacles. Does not dodge, but has advantage to resist being moved or grappled.

macros.name: Wrap (Crushing Hold tier2)
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Cannot be dodged if target cannot see this creature. DC 15 athletics or acrobatics check or be grappled. Grappled creatures take this damage at the start of each turn.

macros.name: Puke Up
macros.description: (2d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d4 poison build up, 5 foot range. Using this on a grappled creature doubles its poison build up.

presets.name: Snail Woman
presets.behavior: A pale female human figure which stretches out of a large snail shell to grab at prey. Does not dodge. Prioritizes nearby creatures in water. Costs 3 AP per movement.

macros.name: Double Slap
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical then (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Slaps at a creature with its wet pale hands.

macros.name: Withdraw (Shield Protector tier2)
macros.description: Retreat into or exit out of shell. While in shell, poise max is doubled and physical armour is increased to 75%.

macros.name: Pull
macros.description: Threaten and grab at a creature within 10 feet. DC 13 athletics or acrobatics check or be restrained. Restrained creatures can be targeted by one free Double Slap each round.

presets.name: Stone Fish
presets.behavior: A semi aquatic fish with a hard stone body. Very territorial and com- monly found in ancient cisterns and bodies of water in warm climates, or during the warmer times of year. Can swim with no movement penalty. Prioratizes the nearest hostile creature in its water with tackles, after pulling the farthest hostile creature with its currents. Dodges diagonally forward left or right 5 feet, randomly at the first instance of threat. Can dodge for 1 FP, but only once per round.

macros.name: Tackle
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range.

macros.name: Pulling Current
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) magic damage, 2d4 poison build up, 20 foot range. Chooses one creature in range in the same body of water, churns water to cause a pulling current. DC 14 athletics check or be pulled one space toward the Stone Fish and take damage/poison, then make the check again. Repeats until they make the DC or are adjacent.

presets.name: Twin Tail Scorpion
presets.behavior: Found in warmer climates where the ground is soft. Can burrow into the ground leaving is two barbed tail stingers intertwined above as an odd looking piece of foliage (DC 14 perception to spot the stingers). Any of its stinger attacks target symmetric spaces in front and behind itself. Ambushes in attack and prioritizes the nearest creature not of its species. Gains 1 free AP of movement on sand or soft terrain. Dodges 5 feet backwards at first threat from either side, once per round.

macros.name: Dual Sting (Sharp Rake tier1)
macros.description: (2d2 + Dex) physical damage, 2d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Can be used as a reaction to being attacked from front or back for 1 FP instead of 4 AP. Targets symmetric spaces in front and behind.

macros.name: Pincer Grab (Crushing Hold tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Threatens a nearby creature with a grab. Medium or smaller creatures hit must make contested athletics check or be grappled. Can move and attack normally while grappling. A creature grappled by both pincers is instead restrained.

presets.name: White Wolf
presets.behavior: (+2 perception, +2 acrobatics) Wolves at home in colder climates. Groups with others to surround and focus targets. Only dodges when not in a group, once per round, 5 feet left or right away from danger.

macros.name: Charge Sprint (Leaping Bite tier1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d2 bleed build up. After a sprint action, jumps and bites at the final three spaces traveled in a line.

macros.name: Bite
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d2 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Can make this for free as a reaction whenever another wolf attacks a target in range (even if the target dodged, as long as they dodged into a space in range).

macros.name: Howl
macros.description: Slow action. 2d4 frost build up to all creatures within 30 feet that can hear, and allow all other wolves in range to deal max bleed build up for one round. Only one wolf may initiate this each round.

presets.name: Afflicted Devourer
presets.behavior: A strange fish like monstrosity which seeks to afflict itself with poisons and other adverse conditions. Its head is a single serrated mouth like opening below a tentacle appendage it uses as an arm or weapon. It floats above the ground and swims through the air. Can move 2 spaces per AP spent, but cannot sprint. Its flesh takes in adverse effects and powers it up in the following ways: when this monstrosity is bled out → its next attack deals maximum damage, poisoned → it becomes fully resistant to physical damage, badly poisoned → all physical damage heals it instead of dealing damage and increase its tiers of resistance to all element damage types by one, frostbitten → it reflects elemental projectiles. Prioritizes nearest creature, or creature which inflicts the greatest amount of status build up. Dodges twice per round, 10 feet left of the direction it faces, on first instance of threat which does not deal status build up. Can dodge while maintaining a slow action.

macros.name: Hot Crystal Tendril
macros.description: (3d4 + Fai) fire then (3d4 + Int) magic damage, 15 foot range. Each attack also deals 2d4 environment-dependent status build up.

macros.name: Environment Curse
macros.description: (1d4) self status build up. Exposes itself to environmental status effects to power up (bleed out = max damage, poisoned = phys immune, badly poisoned = phys heals + element resist up, frostbitten = reflects elemental projectiles).

macros.name: Tail Growth Aspect (spell)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical damage, 15 foot range. Conjures spectral tail sweeping 180 degree arc. Can be charged for second sweep at 20 foot range.

macros.name: Warmth (Inspiring Presence tier1)(spell)
macros.description: (1d8 + Fai) healing, 5 foot range. Creates healing warmth from tentacle appendage. Lasts 5 rounds, heals all in range at start of their turns.

presets.name: Amalgum of Faithful
presets.behavior: An amalgamation of grafted bodies into a holy form of pain and penance. Prioritizes nearest living human in a frenzy of screams and attacks. Can teleport once per round for 1 FP to a space 20 feet away from threat in order to dodge, at the first instance of threat. Takes double true damage from any healing magic it is exposed to.

macros.name: Unending Flurry (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d2 + Dex) physical damage x4, 5 foot range. Moves one space between each attack. Separate poise damage for each 2 rolled.

macros.name: Vomit (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: 3d4 poison build up, 1 poise damage, 30 foot range cone. Poison and poise to all hit, and to creatures moving into affected spaces next round.

macros.name: Smash
macros.description: (4d8 + 4*Dex) physical damage, slow action, 5 foot range. Used only on a staggered creature. Leap up to 25 feet toward the creature. Regenerate to full FP when this hits.

presets.name: Ancient Bat Demon
