presets.behavior: (+4 athletics, +8 firekeeping) Old monstrosity of the dark ages. Massive bat with powerful arms detached from wings. Blind but senses movement and smell within 300 feet. Immune to impaired vision but receives its effects plus deafened. Gains additional FP per turn for every 10 damage dealt last round. Dodges once per round 30 feet in any direction by flapping wings.

macros.name: Exploding Mist (Status Laser tier2)
macros.description: (4d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 2d4 toxic build up, 80 foot range. 15 foot wide line of toxic mist that explodes. Mist deals toxic, explosion deals fire.

macros.name: Slam and Rake (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical, 1d4 bleed, 10 foot range. Repeated four times with one space movement between each, adding extra d8 damage and d4 bleed per repetition.

macros.name: Chaos Orb (spell)
macros.description: (2d12 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 40 foot range. Conjures and hurls a great churning ball of fire at a 15x15 target space.

macros.name: Firestorm (spell)
macros.description: (8d10 + Int + 2*Fai) fire damage, slow action, 60 foot range. Burst of heat decreases fire resistance by one tier for one round. When resolved, air combusts threatening all in range. Cannot be interrupted.

presets.name: Baigujin
presets.behavior: A frail and thin skeletal form with leathery thick skin and a gaping maw where its face should be. Breaths at a quick and erratic pace which can be heard from afar. On its back is a swollen growth of pimples and puss. Covers its entire front and sides with bone material and cannot see. Its arms have had their flesh ripped away revealing jagged and broken bones which the creature uses to attack. Has full resistance to all damage except from behind (where its regular resistances apply, and depend on a bone mending undead to bolster and increase the value of X). Does not dodge. +10 perception to detect noise.

macros.name: React and Rend (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: Reaction. Whenever a non bone mending creature within 80 feet makes a noise, may move up to 10 feet toward the noise. If arriving at source, may use Maddening Swing for free.

macros.name: Maddening Swing (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Swings wildly at perceived noise. If X is 3 or 4, DC 17 sanity check or take one stack of frenzy for a round.

macros.name: Let it Breath (X=1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Rips bones from its back and slams into the ground, hitting all spaces in range. Regenerates 2 FP (lowers X to zero).

macros.name: Let it Breath (X=2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Rips bones from its back and slams into the ground, hitting all spaces in range. Regenerates 4 FP (lowers X to zero).

macros.name: Let it Breath (X=3)
macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Rips bones from its back and slams into the ground, hitting all spaces in range. Regenerates 6 FP (lowers X to zero).

macros.name: Let it Breath (X=4)
macros.description: (4d6 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Rips bones from its back and slams into the ground, hitting all spaces in range. Regenerates 8 FP (lowers X to zero).

presets.name: Blood Saturated Flesh
presets.behavior: A lumb of old corrupted flesh which has been fed blood by Corrupted Vile Undead. When nearby undead are threatened it sprays corrosive blood around itself. Does not move or dodge.

macros.name: Blood Spray (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: (1d4 + Fai) dark damage, 2d4 bleed build up, 20 foot range. Sprays corrosive blood in three different lines up to maximum range.

presets.name: Bloodbag Gatherer Beast
presets.behavior: A huge twisted creature with vaguely human features and elongated bent limbs. Carries a large fleshy bag across its back which it fills with the blood of its victims. Prioritizes targets which are biggest threat to itself or weakest targets which have been bled out. Clambers its way through narrow pathways within ruins, always pushing forward looking for blood as it does. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Mark for Gathering
macros.description: Once per round. Focus on a creature within 40 feet. DC 19 sanity or diplomacy check or this monster is aware of their location regardless of obstruction. Affected creatures take escalating 1d4 bleed build up each turn (increasing by 1d4). Lasts 10 minutes or until they pass the check after being 60+ feet away.

macros.name: Bag Slam
macros.description: (2d8 + Str) physical then (3d6 + Fai) dark damage. First hit slams blood bag on a 10x10 area within 20 feet. Second hit is a dark pulse radiating from the grounded bag hitting all adjacent spaces.

macros.name: Gather Souls
macros.description: (6d6 + 2*Fai) dark damage, slow action. Explosion extending past walls up to 80 feet. Only deals damage to creatures bled out in the last ten minutes. Only usable when Fai is at or above +8.

macros.name: Ritualized Blood
macros.description: Once per round. For every creature bled out within 20 feet last round, and any marked creature bled out in last hour, gain +1 Str and Fai and increase damage die level by one. Lasts 12 hours, stacks up to five times.

presets.name: Bloodbag Ghoul
presets.behavior: A tall and pale malformed thing that longs for blood. Uses its long arms to manipulate and extract the blood of its victims. Prioritizes targets which are biggest threat to itself or weakest targets which have not yet been bled out. When this creature bleeds out a target it heals 2d12 HP and regains 2 FP. Dodges forward 5 feet if unblocked, otherwise backwards 5 feet. Dodges at first instance of threat.

macros.name: Combo Attacks (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical, (1d8 + 3*Fai) dark + 2d6 bleed, (1d4 + Str) physical damage. Kick, piercing fist stab, another kick. Move one space between.

macros.name: Dark Barbs
macros.description: (1d4 + Fai) dark damage, 20 foot range. Fires a cutting barb of tainted blood. If max damage rolled, also deals 6d4 bleed build up.

macros.name: Extract Blood
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical, (1d6 + Str) physical, (4d6 + 3*Str) physical damage, 3d6 bleed build up, slow action. First two attacks pull all hostile creatures within 20 feet 10 feet toward the Ghoul. Final attack threatens front and diagonally front at 5 feet.

presets.name: Bone Wheel Contortionist
presets.behavior: A contorted mess of bones which perhaps was once a skeleton of one or more living creatures. Can climb rocky walls with no penalty by rolling its bones into cracks and crevasses. Moves quickly in straight lines, allowing it to have double speed on its turn until the first time it changes direction. Prioritizes farthest hostile target, first with bone spikes and then by mowing them down. Dodges 10 feet forward or backward away from threat, at the first instance of threat, once per round.

macros.name: Bone Spike
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 30 foot range. Fires an exploding bone spike at a target grid space.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=1) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (1d2) physical damage. X=1 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=2) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (2d2) physical damage. X=2 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=3) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (3d2) physical damage. X=3 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=4) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (4d2) physical damage. X=4 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=5) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (5d2) physical damage. X=5 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=6) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (6d2) physical damage. X=6 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=7) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (7d2) physical damage. X=7 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=8) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (8d2) physical damage. X=8 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=9) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (9d2) physical damage. X=9 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

macros.name: Mow Down (X=10) (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (10d2) physical damage. X=10 spaces moved in a straight line before reaching target. Hitting allows jumping backward up to 10 feet.

presets.name: Cerberus of Decay
presets.behavior: A large monstrous dog which has been twisted by blight and decay. Its head and hind legs are enlarged, causing it to hold up its front legs like small arms. Throws its momentum into its head attacks and is extremely aggressive. Will follow any creature that encroaches on it for kilometers, until it has crushed them into a pulp. If its FP reaches 0 then it is inflicted with the Impaired vision status until its FP has regenerated to its maximum. Prioritizes nearest creature. Dodges once per round when first attacked from the front, 10 feet backwards.

macros.name: Quick Bite
macros.description: (2d10 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Snaps massive jaws. Does not need to turn and face target.

macros.name: Mowing Maw (Devour tier3)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical x4, all 5 foot range in front. Drags head along ground and runs at target. Moves up to 10 feet before each attack, cannot change direction after starting.

macros.name: Head Slam (Ruined Earth tier1)
macros.description: (3d12 + 2*Str) physical damage, 7 poise damage, slow action, 10 foot range. Jumps up to 10 feet into air and toward creature before slamming its enlarged head down.

presets.name: Dead Hand
presets.behavior: (+5 stealth) A great hand attached to a long arm moving through deep snow or sand. Tremor sense. Seeks to grab and drag targets for miles. If arm is severed at 0 HP, the attached portion retracts underground. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Grab
macros.description: 5 foot range. Grabs at a vulnerable or alone creature. Contested athletics check or be grappled.

macros.name: Endless Dragging
macros.description: (1d6) true damage per 3 AP spent in movement to drag grappled prey.

presets.name: Death Root Possessed Shade
presets.behavior: A shadow silhouette creature with death root growing out of its black smoked masked head. Prioritizes creatures within its threat range randomly. Moves incredibly fast allowing for a constant sprint action without restricting itself. As well, this creature can spend 1 FP on reaction to teleport to any space within 15 feet as a dodge, any number of times per round, prioritizing high damage attacks it has already seen. Can spend 1 FP to force stronger humans to respawn nearby instead of at last bonfire/magical resting place.

macros.name: Extended Raking (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d12 + Dex) physical then (1d8 + 2*Dex) physical + 3d4 bleed, 5 foot range. Rakes then quick chops, moves one space between. Teleports behind another target within 15 feet and repeats. If no other target, repeats on same creature.

macros.name: Deathroot Shot (Status Laser tier2)
macros.description: Slow action. Line of rotted liquid on all spaces up to 35 feet. 1d6 curse and 2d6 toxic build up. If badly poisoned, target loses 1d4 FP and this creature gains that amount.

presets.name: Developed Spawn of Glauwrant
presets.behavior: (+4 perception) More developed servants of Glauwrant. Mostly covered with Deep Sea features such as tentacles, beaks, coral growths etc. When out of water for more than 3 days they solidify into a dormant state, but can be turned back when compelled by Glauwrant and submerged. Dodges by teleporting to a space within 15 feet for 1 FP, up to twice per round, intelligently. Prioritizes non Glauwrant blessed creatures.

macros.name: Blue Glaive (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical then (1d10 + Int) magic damage, 10 foot range. Swings chitinous appendage then steps forward and swings magical glaive.

macros.name: Maddening Bell (Cone of Confusion tier2)
macros.description: Slow action, audible range. DC 18 sanity or diplomacy check or be inflicted with berserk for one round. Targets nearest creature only.

macros.name: Mind Drain
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Grab and threaten. DC 19 sanity or diplomacy check or lose 4d20 + 20 souls. If not enough souls, half remainder taken as true damage. On success, regains all FP.

macros.name: Soul Ray (Elemental Ray tier3)(spell)
macros.description: (4d8 + 3*Int) magic damage, 40 foot range. Thick ray of deep blue magic in a line.

presets.name: Flayed Beast
presets.behavior: A lanky monstrosity of bloodlust, which rakes its own skin into hanging mats. At 75 HP gains +1 max AP, +1 End, and 5 foot poison aura which deals 1d6 poison build up to each creature which starts, ends, or moves into one of the spaces. At 50 HP gains +1 max AP, +1 Str, and aura grows to 10 feet and becomes 2d6 poison build up. At 25 HP gains +2 max AP, +1 Str, and aura becomes toxic build up to any poisoned creature. Dodges by using ”Claw Lunge” ability as a reaction. Prioritizes most obviously injured hostile creature, otherwise the nearest hostile creature.

macros.name: Crazed Rake (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical, (1d6 + Dex) physical, (4d4 + 3*Str) physical damage, hits both spaces in front, move one space between each. Below 50 HP each attack also deals 1d4 bleed.

macros.name: Claw Lunge
macros.description: (1d12 + Dex) physical damage, reaction. Usable below 75 HP, once per round when attacked from front. Dodge up to 30 feet toward another creature and attack them.

macros.name: Consume
macros.description: (2d12 + 4*Str) physical damage, 2d12 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Can only target poisoned or badly poisoned creature. Extends arms hitting all spaces in 180 degree arc within 10 feet.

macros.name: Poison Scream (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: Triggers at 75, 50, and 25 HP thresholds. 1d6 poison build up within 20 feet. Non deafened within 35 feet must DC 13 diplomacy or sanity check or become deafened and dazed for one round.

presets.name: Flesh Doctor
presets.behavior: A floating form that vaguely resembles mats of flesh drapped and hang- ing from the torso and arms of a human shape. A figure blessed by the Formless Mother. Seeks to mend and bring together the flesh of nearby monstrosities, undead, and some cosmic entities. Dodges once per round at the greatest percieved threat, if known, 10 feet away from threat or towards an ally. Prioratizes healing allies and pushing away threat.

macros.name: Stitch Form (Inspiring Presence tier1)(spell)
macros.description: (3d8 + Fai) healing, 15 foot range. Heals an ally. Can be slow action for one extra AP to heal all allies within 30 feet.

macros.name: Aside (spell)
macros.description: When moving into a space adjacent to a hostile creature, may force DC 15 athletics check or be pushed 10 feet away or to the side.

macros.name: Bloody Rust (Ruined Earth tier1)
macros.description: (1d2) true damage, 1d2 bleed build up, 20 foot range. Creates rippling red rust on a surface. Creature hit takes damage and bleed, and this creature replenishes 1d2 FP.

presets.name: Fly King
presets.behavior: A large grouping of Petrifying Flies which have tangled among themselves and become attached. The Fly King searches out humans to curse and create more flies from their death. When this monstrosity reaches 0 HP it does not die, but if it takes any more damage then it activates its Fracture ability. Dodges up to two times per round, one space away from threat, for 0 AP. Prioritizes nearest human, or human closest to death.

macros.name: Spread Death
macros.description: (1d6) poison build up, 5 foot range. Deals poison to all other creatures in range. Already poisoned targets take curse instead.

macros.name: Fracture
macros.description: When this creature takes damage at 0 HP it is destroyed and produces 4 Petrifying Fly creatures in nearby spaces.

presets.name: Frenzied Bat Demon King (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: (+8 athletics, +10 firekeeping) An Ancient Bat Demon embracing powerful chaotic flame. All creatures starting turns within 50 feet must DC 12 sanity check or take one frenzy stack. Senses all life within 500 feet. Immune to impaired vision. Gains FP per turn for each frenzy stack caused. Dodges once per round 45 feet. Absorbs fire damage at 50%.

macros.name: Frenzying Mist
macros.description: (4d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 100 foot range. 20 foot wide mist line that explodes. Mist: DC 14 sanity or frenzy stack. Explosion: fire damage.

macros.name: Slam and Burn (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical + (1d6 + Int) fire, 20 foot range. Repeated four times with movement, adding extra d8 physical and d6 fire per repetition. Three+ hits cause frenzy.

presets.name: Frenzied Bat Demon King (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: (+8 athletics, +10 firekeeping) An Ancient Bat Demon embracing powerful chaotic flame. All creatures starting turns within 50 feet must DC 12 sanity check or take one frenzy stack. Senses all life within 500 feet. Immune to impaired vision. Gains FP per turn for each frenzy stack caused. Dodges once per round 45 feet. Absorbs fire damage at 50%.

macros.name: Frenzying Mist
macros.description: (4d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 100 foot range. 20 foot wide mist line that explodes. Mist: DC 14 sanity or frenzy stack. Explosion: fire damage.

macros.name: Slam and Burn (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical + (1d6 + Int) fire, 20 foot range. Repeated four times with movement, adding extra d8 physical and d6 fire per repetition. Three+ hits cause frenzy.

macros.name: Viscous Chaos Orb (spell)
macros.description: (6d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 60 foot range. Phase 2+ only. DC 18 sanity check or gain frenzy stack.

macros.name: Chaos Firestorm (spell)
macros.description: (8d12 + Int + 2*Fai) fire damage, slow action, 80 foot range. Phase 2+ only. All creatures lose all fire resistance for one round. Cannot be interrupted.

presets.name: Frenzied Bat Demon King (Phase 3)
presets.behavior: (+8 athletics, +10 firekeeping) An Ancient Bat Demon embracing powerful chaotic flame. All creatures starting turns within 50 feet must DC 12 sanity check or take one frenzy stack. Senses all life within 500 feet. Immune to impaired vision. Gains FP per turn for each frenzy stack caused. Dodges once per round 45 feet. Absorbs fire damage at 50%.

macros.name: Frenzying Mist
macros.description: (4d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 100 foot range. 20 foot wide mist line that explodes. Mist: DC 14 sanity or frenzy stack. Explosion: fire damage.

macros.name: Slam and Burn (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical + (1d6 + Int) fire, 20 foot range. Repeated four times with movement, adding extra d8 physical and d6 fire per repetition. Three+ hits cause frenzy.

macros.name: Viscous Chaos Orb (spell)
macros.description: (6d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, 60 foot range. Phase 2+ only. DC 18 sanity check or gain frenzy stack.

macros.name: Chaos Firestorm (spell)
macros.description: (8d12 + Int + 2*Fai) fire damage, slow action, 80 foot range. Phase 2+ only. All creatures lose all fire resistance for one round. Cannot be interrupted.

macros.name: May Chaos Take the World
macros.description: (1d6 + Int + Fai) fire damage, once per round, 60 foot range. Phase 3 only. Each creature rolls (1+X)d10 where X = frenzy stacks. Each result 6 or lower causes damage and frenzy.

presets.name: Greater Mimic
presets.behavior: Appears as an object with +8 Stealth when hidden. If interacted with then automatically opens its gaping maw and devours target with no dodge oppor- tunity. After it is exposed, it stands tall on two long legs and fights with fierce kicks and bites. The first time it is hit by a dual charm in a 10 hour period, it falls asleep and contorts back into its hidden form. If its FP is reduced to zero then it takes 3 poise damage in its confusion. Prioritizes creature which revealed it. After revealed, it can dodge once per round 10 feet forward when attacked from the side for the first time in a round.

macros.name: Devour (Surprise Feast tier3)
macros.description: (6d8 + 2*Str) physical damage. Cannot be dodged if target is surprised. Half damage if DC 17 (20 if surprised) athletics or acrobatics check.

macros.name: Spinning Kick
macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Str) physical damage. Moves forward three spaces threatening all creatures passed into. Creatures hit are pushed left or right.

macros.name: Standing Kick
macros.description: (2d10 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Can be charged as slow action to deal double damage and 6 poise damage.

presets.name: Hollow Jailer
presets.behavior: A monstrosity formed of the Abyss. Can be found where undead have amassed for many ages. A stone mask covers its head and a dark robe drapes over its shapeless body. It seeks to herd undead and shepherd them through maddening torture. Always faces the nearest hostile creature regardless of movement. Recovers Int FP at the start of each of its turns. Dodges backwards at the first instance of threat from the front, up to ten feet. Prioritizes nearest non undead.

macros.name: Maddening Flame (Cone of Confusion tier2)
macros.description: (3d10 + 2*Fai) fire damage, 5 foot range. Threatens all creatures within 5 feet. DC 18 sanity or acrobatics check or take damage and lose all vision for one round.

macros.name: Inhuman Shuffle (*tier2)
macros.description: Move up to three spaces in any direction.

macros.name: Gravity Storm
macros.description: (5d6 + 3*Fai) dark damage, 25 foot range. Choose a 10x10 area. All hit take damage and become over encumbered for one round.

macros.name: Embolden Undead
macros.description: Once per round. All undead within 60 feet gain 3 extra AP on their next turns. All non undead in the area take 1d2 curse build up.

presets.name: Kindred of Rot (Large)
presets.behavior: A monstrous humanoid centipede form. Large variant. Worships blight of rot. Prioritizes Pest Strings if multiple targets, otherwise bone glaive. Dodges twice per round ten feet, diagonally back, somewhat intelligently.

macros.name: Pest Strings (spell)
macros.description: (1d6) physical damage, 25 foot range. Conjures four pestilent strings toward up to four targets. Can be charged for 30ft and eight strings.

macros.name: Bone Glaive (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d12 + Dex) physical damage, 10 foot range.

presets.name: Kindred of Rot (Medium)
presets.behavior: A monstrous form which worships the blight of rot. Its body roughly resembles a humanoid centipede with legs made from full human arms. Its head is a conical growth and its back curls this way and that. The smaller kindred often worship under the guidance of a larger kindred nearby large pools of blight. Known to also carry bone glaives made of their kind. prioritizes casting its pest strings if multiple hostile creatures are in range, otherwise uses its bone glaive. Dodges twice per round at a range of five/ten feet, somewhat intelligently, diagonally back left or right, away from threat.

macros.name: Pest Strings (spell)
macros.description: (1d4) physical damage, 25 foot range. Conjures four pestilent strings toward up to four targets. Strings can curve and pursue dodging targets. Max one string per creature. Can be charged for 30ft range and eight strings (two per creature).

macros.name: Bone Glaive (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d8 + Dex) physical damage, 10 foot range. Attacks with equipped bone glaive.

presets.name: Kraken (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: (+5 athletics, +1 acrobatics) Direct spawn of Glauwrant. Can travel into/out of Deep Sea at will. Sprinting speed in water 30+ feet deep. 5-8 tentacles, each can be limb fractured for one round from 100+ direct damage. Dodges once per round by descending 15 feet. Does not cancel slow actions. Regenerates Att mod FP each round.

macros.name: Tentacle Slap
macros.description: (3d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 25 foot range. Slams tentacle in a line. Large or smaller creatures at end space are grappled and can be moved. Already grappled become restrained.

macros.name: Saltfrost Icicle Spear (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int) magic damage, 2d4 frost build up, 40 foot range. Deep cold crystal icicle that erupts on impact.

presets.name: Kraken (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: (+5 athletics, +1 acrobatics) Direct spawn of Glauwrant. Can travel into/out of Deep Sea at will. Sprinting speed in water 30+ feet deep. 5-8 tentacles, each can be limb fractured for one round from 100+ direct damage. Dodges once per round by descending 15 feet. Does not cancel slow actions. Regenerates Att mod FP each round.

macros.name: Tentacle Slap
macros.description: (3d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 25 foot range. Slams tentacle in a line. Large or smaller creatures at end space are grappled and can be moved. Already grappled become restrained.

macros.name: Saltfrost Icicle Spear (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int) magic damage, 2d4 frost build up, 40 foot range. Deep cold crystal icicle that erupts on impact.

macros.name: Deep Bead (spell)
macros.description: (6d6 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 35 foot range cone. Phase 2+ only.

macros.name: Pull of the Deep Sea (Oceans Pull tier4)
macros.description: DC 27 athletics or acrobatics to resist water pull. Submerged must DC 18 athletics to breach. Phase 2+ only.

presets.name: Kraken (Phase 3)
presets.behavior: (+5 athletics, +1 acrobatics) Direct spawn of Glauwrant. Can travel into/out of Deep Sea at will. Sprinting speed in water 30+ feet deep. 5-8 tentacles, each can be limb fractured for one round from 100+ direct damage. Dodges once per round by descending 15 feet. Does not cancel slow actions. Regenerates Att mod FP each round.

macros.name: Tentacle Slap
macros.description: (3d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 25 foot range. Slams tentacle in a line. Large or smaller creatures at end space are grappled and can be moved. Already grappled become restrained.

macros.name: Saltfrost Icicle Spear (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int) magic damage, 2d4 frost build up, 40 foot range. Deep cold crystal icicle that erupts on impact.

macros.name: Deep Bead (spell)
macros.description: (6d6 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 35 foot range cone. Phase 2+ only.

macros.name: Pull of the Deep Sea (Oceans Pull tier4)
macros.description: DC 27 athletics or acrobatics to resist water pull. Submerged must DC 18 athletics to breach. Phase 2+ only.

macros.name: Augur of the Deep (spell)
macros.description: Slow action. Opens 2d4 portals summoning large tentacles (80 HP each) that can Tentacle Slap once per round. Phase 3+ only.

presets.name: Leather Leech (Large)
presets.behavior: A ravenous Leech which has grown to large size after bleeding out a target. Has 50 feet of tremor sense and small white eyes. If FP reaches zero, inflicted with impaired vision. Prioritizes largest creature in move and attack range. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Drain
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 2d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. On hit, grapples itself to the target. Leech may still use this while attached. 3 AP and contested athletics to remove.

macros.name: Shredding Maw
macros.description: (2d4 + Str) physical, (2d4 + Str) physical, (2d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d2 durability damage to all armor on each hit, 5 foot range. Moves up to 10 feet in a straight line between each attack. Large only.

presets.name: Leather Leech (Small)
presets.behavior: A ravenous Leech which burrows through soft earth and sand in search of blood. Has 50 feet of tremor sense and small white eyes. If an attached Leech bleeds out its target, its size increases to large. If FP reaches zero, inflicted with impaired vision. Prioritizes largest creature in move and attack range. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Drain
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 2d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. On hit, grapples itself to the target, causing double AP movement cost. Leech may still use this ability while attached. Attached creatures must spend 3 AP and win contested athletics to remove.

presets.name: Lesser Spawn of Glauwrant
presets.behavior: (+4 perception) Lesser servants of Glauwrant. Human in shape but with Deep Sea features such as tentacled faces and pale wet flesh. When out of water for more than 3 days they solidify into a dormant state, but can be turned back when compelled by Glauwrant and submerged. Dodges once per round 10 feet backwards at the first instance of threat. Prioritizes nearest non Glauwrant blessed creatures.

macros.name: Pursuing Deep (Elemental Bolt tier1)(spell)
macros.description: (1d6 + Fai) dark damage, 20 foot range. If it misses, continues toward another target in range.

macros.name: Numbing Bell
macros.description: Slow action, audible range. When resolved, all creatures in audible range cannot heal in any way over the next round.

macros.name: Lesser Soul Ray (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + 3*Int) magic damage, 30 foot range. Line of deep blue magic threatening all creatures in a line.

presets.name: Mass of Souls
presets.behavior: A spawn of the Abyss and an amalgam of human dead. Has the appear- ance of a large black ooze with multiple protruding faces and limbs. Does not dodge and prefers not to move. Prioritizes any nearby life.

macros.name: Mouth Spear (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 15 foot range. Opens a mouth to produce a spear which stabs at a target.

macros.name: Ooze
macros.description: 1d4 curse build up, 15 foot range cone. DC 14 acrobatics check or take 2 poise damage.

macros.name: Skull Wisp Spawn (*tier3)
macros.description: Summon a skull wisp in an adjacent space. Wisp moves 2 spaces per round until within 10 feet of hostile, then explodes for (1d10) dark damage within 10 feet. Each wisp has 5 HP.

presets.name: Mercurous Failure
presets.behavior: A failed Mercurous copy of human form. Unaware of own existence and tries to interact innocently, causing petrification. Multiple in same area tend to form a Mercurous Hydra. When dropped to 0 HP splits into two copies with half max HP (until max HP less than 10). If FP reaches 0, it dies. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Confused Embrace
macros.description: (2d6) magic damage, 5 foot range. Grabs and threatens adjacent creature. DC 12 sanity check or have one limb petrified (limb fracture for 10 minutes). If all limbs petrified, encased in stone and die.

macros.name: Nonsense
macros.description: Mutters anomalous nonsense. All humans within 30 feet that can hear must DC 10 sanity or diplomacy check or feel deep pity, giving -2 sanity until all Mercurous Failures and singing Hydras nearby are destroyed.

presets.name: Mercurous Hydra
presets.behavior: A large amalgam of pained Mercurous Failures who yearn for life. This monstrosity petrifies humans and places its favorites around its layer to maintain a sense of comfort. As long as it is comfortable and calm, it will follow new humans around, observe them, and give them bad luck (any time a human rolls a skill check within 50 feet of the Hydra, it rolls a d2, if the result is a 2 then the human must reroll the skill check and take the lower of the two results), until they are mentally weak enough to petrify. It remains out of sight by continuously singing an anomalous song which forces all humans within 300 feet to ignore its presence when they fail a DC 27 sanity check. If all of its petrified trophies are destroyed then the Hydra will pursue and try to kill those responsible. When killed this monstrosity becomes 3d4 hostile Mercurous Failures. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Eat Them
macros.description: (1d6) physical damage, 10 foot range. Bite and move 5 feet. Repeat 3d2 times for no extra AP. Cannot sing anomalous song while using this.

macros.name: Bad Luck
macros.description: Whenever a human within 50 feet fails a skill check, may spend FP to give them -2 to that skill permanently (until this creature dies).

macros.name: Petrify
macros.description: Slow action, line of sight. Cannot sing while using this. DC 5 sanity check or be fully petrified and die. Humans with less than 5 HP automatically fail.

presets.name: Mimic
presets.behavior: Appears as an object with +6 stealth when hidden. If interacted with, automatically devours target with no dodge opportunity. After exposed, stands on two long legs and fights with kicks and bites. If hit by a dual charm falls asleep. If FP reaches 0 takes 3 poise damage. Prioritizes creature which revealed it. Dodges once per round 10 feet forward when attacked from the side.

macros.name: Devour (Surprise Feast tier3)
macros.description: (5d6 + 2*Str) physical damage. Cannot be dodged if surprised. Half damage if DC 15 (18 if surprised) athletics or acrobatics check.

macros.name: Spinning Kick
macros.description: (1d12 + 2*Str) physical damage. Moves forward three spaces threatening all creatures passed into. Pushed left or right.

macros.name: Standing Kick
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Can be charged as slow action for double damage and 6 poise.

presets.name: Mimic Gate
presets.behavior: (+4 athletics) A rare mimic disguised as an entire room. Face and arms dangle from a wall (only damageable parts). Room seals and walls close in. May spend 1 FP once per round to change which wall it dangles from without canceling slow actions. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Pillars of Light
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical + (2d6 + Int) lightning damage, slow action, sight range. Chooses four 15x15 locations that glow then erupt. Not interrupted by other abilities.

macros.name: Crush
macros.description: (1d8 + 2*Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Grab and threaten. Larger creatures require contested athletics. Grappled creatures take damage; already grappled take true damage instead.

macros.name: Encroaching Walls
macros.description: Close one to four walls inward 5 feet. DC 25 athletics to hold a wall back. Creatures pushed into no space take 4d6 true damage. Used once per round at end of turns.

presets.name: Mimic Parasite
presets.behavior: Small mimics that transition through a few life stages. First they disguise themselves as small food items such as vegetables, fruit, or consumables items, or even liquids in a container waiting patiently - never rotting - to be eaten. It’s said after gestation in a host they resemble a long Mimic tongue with budding teeth protruding randomly from it’s wormlike body as their second stage. During this time their behavior shifts to seeking out souls, and acquiring any the host tries to receive. For their third stage they attempt to kill the host. Mimic Parasites do not regenerate FP in combat, but can replenish all FP and HP at once upon laying dormant and resting for 8 hours inside a host that has been taken over with the Supplant ability. If the parasite runs out of FP before it can successfully use the Supplant ability, then it dies. Mimic Parasites take true damage equal to 10% of any HP lost by their host (rounded down). Upon the host bleeding out from the Bleed status effect, the parasite is exposed from the bleeding wound, allowing it to be grappled for 1 round. However attempting to do so negates the option to staunch the bleeding. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Supplant
macros.description: Can be used after 24 hours of first being consumed. DC 12 vitality check to fight off the parasite. If successful the host is taken over, allowing regeneration and Bodyguard Manipulation.

macros.name: Bodyguard Manipulation
macros.description: Only usable after Supplant. Forces temporary control over host. During the Mimic's turn or for 5 seconds out of combat, the Mimic can use its own AP to make the host perform actions, using the host's FP.

macros.name: Metamorphic Eruption
macros.description: Slow action. A Mimic Parasite that has accumulated 50 souls and is within a dead or undead host may burst forth as a new fully grown Mimic.

presets.name: Molding Leather Leech (Large)
presets.behavior: A large ravenous molding Leech that has grown after bleeding out a target. Whenever this creature poisons another, their victim is simultaneously bled out. If FP reaches zero, inflicted with impaired vision. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Molded Drain
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 2d6 poison build up, 5 foot range. On hit, grapples itself to the target. 3 AP and contested athletics to remove.

macros.name: Shredding Maw
macros.description: (2d4 + Str) physical, (2d4 + Str) physical, (2d4 + Str) physical damage, 1d4 toxic build up on each hit, 5 foot range. Moves up to 10 feet in a straight line between each attack. Large only.

presets.name: Molding Leather Leech (Small)
presets.behavior: A ravenous molding Leech which burrows through soft, rotten earth. Has 50 feet of tremor sense and small white eyes. Whenever this creature poisons another, their victim is simultaneously bled out. If an attached Leech bleeds out its target, its size increases to large. If FP reaches zero, inflicted with impaired vision. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Molded Drain
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 2d6 poison build up, 5 foot range. On hit, grapples itself to the target, causing double AP movement cost. 3 AP and contested athletics to remove.

presets.name: Prince of Flies (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: When multi Fly Kings gain access to a human corpse for a prolonged period of time they plant a growing death within which eventually becomes an in- stance of this powerful monstrosity. Its form is obscured with roots of death and flies, but it seems to move slowly across the ground or fly to reach inaccessible prey. Each time this monstrosity is attacked, it loses 25% of its resistance to that damage type until the start of its next turn. This effect stacks, but does not proceed into vulnerability (below 0%). Does not dodge. Prioritizes moving near and bringing death to all living humans within a large radius. Any hu- man which dies within 500 feet is unable to respawn at their last magical resting place and instead reforms in the space they fell (if they are able).

macros.name: Inject Blight
macros.description: 5 foot range. Grapple attempt. If successful, injects roots of death causing lasting affliction pulling victim closer to death.

macros.name: Aura of Decay
macros.description: 3d4 toxic build up, range = current FP * 10 feet. Every creature starting their turn or first moving into the aura takes toxic. Poisoned or badly poisoned creatures take curse instead.

macros.name: Family of Blight
macros.description: Phase transition reaction. Creates Fly King monstrosities in adjacent spaces equal to the new phase number.

presets.name: Prince of Flies (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: When multi Fly Kings gain access to a human corpse for a prolonged period of time they plant a growing death within which eventually becomes an in- stance of this powerful monstrosity. Its form is obscured with roots of death and flies, but it seems to move slowly across the ground or fly to reach inaccessible prey. Each time this monstrosity is attacked, it loses 25% of its resistance to that damage type until the start of its next turn. This effect stacks, but does not proceed into vulnerability (below 0%). Does not dodge. Prioritizes moving near and bringing death to all living humans within a large radius. Any hu- man which dies within 500 feet is unable to respawn at their last magical resting place and instead reforms in the space they fell (if they are able).

macros.name: Inject Blight
macros.description: 5 foot range. Grapple attempt. If successful, injects roots of death causing lasting affliction pulling victim closer to death.

macros.name: Aura of Decay
macros.description: 3d4 toxic build up, range = current FP * 10 feet. Every creature starting their turn or first moving into the aura takes toxic. Poisoned or badly poisoned creatures take curse instead.

macros.name: Retrieve Flies
macros.description: Phase 2+ only. When 8 or more Petrifying Flies are within 100 feet, absorb them to heal fully back one entire phase.

macros.name: Family of Blight
macros.description: Phase transition reaction. Creates Fly King monstrosities in adjacent spaces equal to the new phase number.

macros.name: Corpse Eruption (Explosion tier4)
macros.description: (8d12) dark damage, 50 foot range. Activated at 0 HP on final phase. Eruption of viscera and deathblight. DC 12 vitality check every ten minutes for 40 minutes or gain one exhaustion stack.

macros.name: Family of Blight
macros.description: Phase transition reaction. Creates Fly King monstrosities in adjacent spaces equal to the new phase number.

presets.name: Puss of Man
presets.behavior: The remains of an undead which carries a large portion of Abyssal influ- ence within. When the undead is killed this creature bursts out from them, pushes all adjacent creatures back one space and knocks them prone. Dodges up to ten feet backwards at the first instance of threat. Prioritizes then nearest non undead and non Abyssal life.

macros.name: Dark Swipes (Flurry of Cuts tier1)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) dark damage x3, 5 foot range. Flails and thrashes hitting all spaces in front.

macros.name: Curse Spray
macros.description: 1d6 toxic build up, 1d6 curse build up, 15x15 foot area adjacent. Sprays black fluid raining down on all creatures within.

macros.name: Rampage (*tier3)
macros.description: (2d8 + 2*Str) dark damage, 5 foot range. Moves forward up to 15 feet while rampaging. Threatens creatures at each movement instance. Creatures moved into are thrown away and knocked prone.

presets.name: Rot Blossomed Undead (Advanced)
presets.behavior: An undead which has been exposed to the blight of the rot blossom. Its flesh is scarlet with the growths of the rot and is easily damaged, but relentlessly repairs itself. Can spend 1 FP on the start of each of its turns in combat to heal for 2d4 HP. More advanced Rot Blossomed Undead have increased HP and give slightly increased souls. Prioritizes nearest creature which is not afflicted with rot. If a creature dodges out of its claw range then it follows up with initiating a Puke Spores ability. Dodges once per round at the first instance of threat, backwards 5 feet.

macros.name: Rot Claw
macros.description: (1d4 + Str) physical damage, 2d4 poison build up, 2d2 toxic build up, 5 foot range. DC 13 fire keeping check or be inflicted with rot (lowers resistances, thresholds, gives exhaustion, curse and toxic build up, can permanently afflict a limb).

macros.name: Grab and Hold (Pincushion Grab tier2)
macros.description: Grapple attempt on an adjacent creature. If it succeeds, the creature takes 2d4 toxic build up and is grappled. May attack grappled creatures with extra fungal appendages.

macros.name: Puke Spores
macros.description: (2d4 + 2*Fai) physical damage, 15 foot range, slow action. Pukes a mass of spores at one target. DC 15 fire keeping check or be infected by a permanent rot blossom.

presets.name: Rot Blossomed Undead (Normal)
presets.behavior: An undead which has been exposed to the blight of the rot blossom. Its flesh is scarlet with the growths of the rot and is easily damaged, but relentlessly repairs itself. Can spend 1 FP on the start of each of its turns in combat to heal for 2d4 HP. More advanced Rot Blossomed Undead have increased HP and give slightly increased souls. Prioritizes nearest creature which is not afflicted with rot. If a creature dodges out of its claw range then it follows up with initiating a Puke Spores ability. Dodges once per round at the first instance of threat, backwards 5 feet.

macros.name: Grab and Hold (Pincushion Grab tier2)
macros.description: Grapple attempt on an adjacent creature. If it succeeds, the creature takes 2d4 toxic build up and is grappled. May attack grappled creatures with extra fungal appendages.

macros.name: Puke Spores
macros.description: (2d4 + 2*Fai) physical damage, 15 foot range, slow action. Pukes a mass of spores at one target. DC 15 fire keeping check or be infected by a permanent rot blossom.

presets.name: Rot Corvid
presets.behavior: A monstrous raven like creature with twisted proportions. Extremely aggressive and territorial. Known to follow its prey for large distances, pecking and clawing at them until they are killed. Prioritizes weakest looking creature in combat. Dodges twice per round by leaping upwards up to ten feet before hovering and falling back down. Dodges at the first instance of threat from the creature it is focusing on.

macros.name: Leaping Claws (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (3d6 + Dex) physical x2, 10 foot range. Hovers and brings down talons. Moves up to 10 feet before each attack. Both attacks on same creature knocks prone.

macros.name: Beak Stab (Seismic Toss tier4)
macros.description: (4d8 + 2*Dex) physical damage, 7 poise damage, slow action, 5 foot range. Leaps up moving up to 20 feet before smashing beak into target space. Creatures hit knocked prone.

macros.name: Eat (Devour tier3)
macros.description: 10 foot range. Grabs prone creature with beak. Smaller creatures are swallowed and killed if not removed within 2 minutes. Large creatures only restrained in beak.

presets.name: Rot Giant Head (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: (+10 athletics, -5 stealth, -5 acrobatics) Massive head of a lost child of a giant god of rot. Gains 25% resistance to all non-true non-fire damage for each of its four undestroyed limbs within 500 feet. Can reanimate nearby corpses into Skeleton undead and command them. Does not dodge. Triggers Pressure Wave on phase transition.

macros.name: Searing Visage (Brain Itch tier4)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic + (1d6 + Fai) fire damage, sight range. Once per round. All creatures in line of sight are threatened unless they dodge behind cover.

macros.name: Putrid Crystal (spell)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage, 1d2 toxic build up, 30 foot range. Fires convulsing bolt of putrid crystal.

macros.name: Pressure Wave (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: Phase transition only. All non undead in range not behind full cover must DC 20 athletics or acrobatics check or be pushed to max range, or until hitting barrier for 2d6 true damage.

presets.name: Rot Giant Head (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: (+10 athletics, -5 stealth, -5 acrobatics) Massive head of a lost child of a giant god of rot. macros.name: Acidic Needle
macros.description: (2d6) fire damage, 200 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Orange glow stabs at target. Must dodge away or take damage. DC 14 Vit check next two turns or repeat damage and puke acidic bile (1d4 durability).

macros.name: Spreading Disease
macros.description: Phase 2+ only. DC 18 sanity check or spreading disease (2d4 poison per turn, spreads when near others). Regains 1d4 FP on spread/poison. Lasts 1 minute. One instance at a time.
