macros.description: Phase 4+ only. Summon two Skeleton undead. Max once every three rounds.

presets.name: Rot Servant
presets.behavior: Monks of the rot which have given themselves fully to its blossoms. Regains all FP whenever a creature within 50 feet is poisoned. Targets non rot creatures intelligently. Dodges once per round, 5 feet, intelligently.

macros.name: Rotting Earth (spell)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int + Fai) physical damage, 3d2 poison build up, 35 foot range. Tosses mold-riddled earth ball. Creatures hit take additional 3d4 poison and 3 poise each time they consume something orally next round.

macros.name: Poison Mist (spell)
macros.description: 1d6 poison build up, 20 foot range. Creates 10x10 area of poison. Creatures starting or moving into the spaces take poison. Poisoned creatures take half in toxic.

macros.name: Rot Chaos Bolt
macros.description: (2d6 + Int + Fai) random element damage, 25 foot range. Can only target poisoned or badly poisoned creature. Damage type determined by d4: 1=magic, 2=fire, 3=lightning, 4=dark.

presets.name: Rotted Monstrosity
presets.behavior: An amalgam of rotted undead human flesh which has combined into a mad ever changing form. Seems to be effectively immortal until a strange rune deep within it is destroyed (rune has 100 HP). When under 50% HP it heals 50 HP every round on the start of its turn until it reaches full HP. When it reaches zero or less HP its regeneration is not stopped (although it can be delayed), but the creature stops taking actions until it is above half HP once more. Dodges up to 10 feet forwards or diagonally forwards when attacked from the sides or behind, twice per round. Can jump up to 30 feet and climb with no detriment. Will prioritize creatures that are more closely packed. Will try to jump away and regenerate when running low on FP.

macros.name: Pustule Burst (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: Reaction. When taking more than 10 damage in one attack (before armor), all creatures within 5 feet take 1d4 toxic build up.

macros.name: Flesh Slam (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d12 + 2*Str) physical damage, 1d4 toxic build up, 10 foot range. Hits all spaces in a cross shape within 5 feet of target. If target badly poisoned, physical becomes dark damage with +1*Fai scaling.

macros.name: Plunging Smash
macros.description: When jumping down more than 20 feet, deals 1d20 true damage directly below and same in physical to all adjacent spaces. Creatures landed on are pushed out and knocked prone.

macros.name: Throw Flesh
macros.description: (2d6 + 2*Int) dark damage, 1d2 toxic build up, 25 foot range. Hits all spaces up to 15 feet beyond target. Max twice per round.

macros.name: Maddening Ring (Cone of Confusion tier2)
macros.description: (3d6 + Fai) dark damage, slow action. Reveals a dark runic ring. All creatures facing and able to see this creature take damage. DC 17 sanity check or frenzy.

presets.name: Sand Scarred Mass
presets.behavior: (+5 Athletics) A mass of callused flesh and sand. Chained by strands of sand, this monstrosity forever wanders desert wastes and causes small twisters of cutting wind as it looks for the bones of beasts and human alike. If its sand chains are removed or saturated by water, then its physical armor is removed, its poise max is halved, and its athletics bonus is removed. Does not dodge, and cannot see. It finds its victims through the touch of its 35 foot sand aura (all who start their turn in the aura must make a DC 14 perception check or be inflicted with impaired vision until the start of their next turn). Prioritizes the nearest threat.

macros.name: Cutting Wind (Sandstorm tier3)
macros.description: (3d2 + Fai) physical damage, 2d4 bleed build up, 3 poise damage, slow action. Threatens all creatures within 20 feet.

macros.name: Multi Slam (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical, (1d6 + Str) physical, (1d10 + 2*Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Three slams at a single target space.

macros.name: Boiled Sand (Ruined Earth tier1)
macros.description: Once per round. All grounded creatures in 35ft aura must DC 14 athletics or acrobatics check or be rotated 90 degrees clockwise around the monstrosity (1d6 true damage if pushed into something). Roll less than 5 also knocked prone.

presets.name: Seabed Crawler
presets.behavior: (+5 athletics) A twisted lanky form said to originate from the realm of the Deep Sea. Has the rough shape of a human but with incredibly long arms and legs. Twisting hair covers any resemblance to a face and multiple extra sets of limbs can form along its body. A rare sighting on land, but can sometime be seen in shallow waters near islands or on beaches in the night. Within the Deep Sea these monstrosities can grow to hundreds of feet tall and induce mind melting horror in any who lay eyes on them. Dodges twice per round intelligently. If threatened by a melee attack then it makes a contested athletics check with the attacker and if they fail they are turned around and their attack targets an opposite space. If threatened by a ranged attack it dodges up to ten feet in any direction. Prioritizes non Glauwrant blessed creatures intelligently.

macros.name: Flail (Flurry of Cuts tier1)
macros.description: (4d8 + 2*Str) physical damage, 4d2 frost build up, 5 foot range. Flails cold wet limbs threatening all spaces within range.

macros.name: Swipe and Slam
macros.description: (2d10 + Str) physical + 1d4 frost, then (2d12 + 4*Str) physical + 1d8 frost damage. Wide sweep hitting all spaces in 10ft arc, then slam targeting 15ft hitting all within 5ft of target.

macros.name: Icicle Spear (spell)
macros.description: (4d8 + 2*Int) magic damage, 1d6 frost build up, 50 foot range. Frozen spear that erupts on impact hitting target and adjacent spaces.

macros.name: Storm (spell)
macros.description: (6d12 + 2*Fai) lightning damage, slow action. Causes lightning storm. Underwater: erupts and threatens all within 40 feet.

macros.name: Mirror Skin (spell)
macros.description: 5 round duration. Oily film coats body. All magic and lightning spells are reflected back to caster. Gains two additional tiers of physical resistance. Can be dispelled.

macros.name: Diffuse (spell)
macros.description: 2 round duration, 35 foot range. Targets creature with 10 or lower intelligence. DC 17 sanity or diplomacy check or unable to take aggressive actions against this creature for two rounds. Can be dispelled.

macros.name: Tentacle Slap
macros.description: (3d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 25 foot range. Slams tentacle in a line to target space. Large or smaller creatures at end space are grappled and can be moved. Already grappled creatures become restrained.

macros.name: Saltfrost Icicle Spear (spell)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int) magic damage, 2d4 frost build up, 40 foot range. Forms water into a deep cold crystal icicle, throws at target, erupts hitting adjacent spaces.

macros.name: Deep Bead (spell)
macros.description: (6d6 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 35 foot range cone. Opens beaked mouth and breaths cascade of dark blue beads. Phase 2+ only.

macros.name: Pull of the Deep Sea (Oceans Pull tier4)
macros.description: 100 foot range. All water in range pulls creatures under. DC 27 athletics or acrobatics to resist. Submerged must DC 18 athletics to breach surface. Phase 2+ only.

macros.name: Augur of the Deep (spell)
macros.description: Slow action, 100 foot range. Opens 2d4 portals to the deep sea. Each summons a large tentacle (80 HP, Kraken resistances) that can use Tentacle Slap once per round. Phase 3+ only.

presets.name: Smoky Ooze
presets.behavior: A large oily slime which all but floats around if not for a bed of dark brown smoke which billows out from beneath it. Its existence involves slowly moving over smaller organic material to break it up and add to its flesh. Moves toward the nearest organic being or churns and digests a creature it is already over, does not dodge. Takes 5d20 + 60 true damage when fully drenched by water for the first time in a day.

macros.name: Smoky Corrosion
macros.description: (2d6) true damage, movement. Moves over a grid space occupied by a large or smaller creature, or churns to digest a creature already within. Creatures moved over or digested are restrained. Contested athletics check to move one space; if still inside, remain restrained.

macros.name: Spring Reaction (Great Shield Protector tier3)
macros.description: Reaction. When hit by a melee attack, may move one grid space as a reaction.

presets.name: Static Darkbeast
presets.behavior: A hunched and strange monstrosity of skeletal form covered in thick dark hair which crackles with static. Each time it deals lightning damage to one or more targets at once, the beast heals for 1d6 HP. It is a nocturnal creature which seeks prey in anything smaller than it. Prioritizes its nearest prey, or the smallest target if multiple are at the same distance. Dodges twice per round at the first instance of threat, for 1 AP, up to 15 feet backwards. Once per round, it may roar and activate its Static Burst ability as a reaction when hit by a melee attacker.

macros.name: Bloodlust Rampage (Rampage tier3)
macros.description: (1d12 + Dex) physical + 1d8 bleed, (1d12 + Dex) physical + 1d8 bleed, (2d12 + Dex) physical + 2d6 bleed, (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 15 foot range. Series of claw slashes and a bite. Bite inflicts locked up for one round. Move one space between each attack.

macros.name: Static Burst
macros.description: (3d6 + Fai) lightning damage, 20 foot range. Reaction to melee damage. Roars and sends static toward all spaces. Creatures hit are pushed one space away.

macros.name: Lightning Discharges (Elemental Discharges tier3)
macros.description: (1d6 + Fai) lightning damage, 40 foot range. Sends lightning crackle toward two spaces. Only used if not enough AP for another Rampage.

macros.name: Lightning Explosion (Explosion tier4)
macros.description: (6d12 + 3*Fai) lightning damage, 50 foot range, slow action. Only initiates at half HP or less. Builds immense static causing area to glow. Cannot be interrupted.

presets.name: Tomb Keeper Scorpion
presets.behavior: A strange giant scorpion with pale squishy skin and beast like hair. Wanders the walls and floors of deep tombs and blighted lands, feasting on rotted flesh. Can dodge once per round for free, away from the source of the attack, when attacked from any direction. Has 2 AP of free movement per round. When killed they explode in a toxic and acidic burst, threatening all adjacent spaces and dealing 2d4 toxic build up and 1d4 durability damage to all creatures hit and their armor and weapons. Anytime this creature causes another to become poisoned or badly poisoned, the victim gains one point of exhaustion.

macros.name: Sting (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 1d6 poison and 1d4 toxic build up, 5 foot range.

macros.name: Swarming Young (Pincushion Grab tier2)
macros.description: (10d2) physical damage, 25 foot range. Sends young to swarm a 10x10 foot area. Creatures swarmed take damage, 5d2 toxic build up, and locked up condition.

presets.name: Twisted Specter
presets.behavior: A tormented spirit which has not found rest in death for many years. Cannot be damaged and is not tangible unless the creature interacting with it holds a specially significant nearby object to the spirit. Is aware of all life within 50 feet and can move through walls and barriers to reach it. Prioritizes nearest life. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Dread
macros.description: Choose one living creature within 30 feet that can perceive this spirit. DC 12 diplomacy check or spend 5 AP to endanger themselves next turn. Cannot be reused on same creature for one minute.

macros.name: Stab (Sharp Rake tier1)
macros.description: (2d4) physical damage, 5 foot range. Threaten and stab at a nearby creature.

macros.name: Bloody Scream (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: 2d6 bleed build up, 20 foot range cone. Sprays dark blood. All hit take bleed and are demoralized (-5 diplomacy for one minute, does not stack).

presets.name: Vacuous Husk
presets.behavior: A black husk like shell of a body. Floats above the ground and looks as if it is draped in a tangle of black cloth. Will seek to drain life from nearby humans by implanting them with a mental disease after weakening them. Does not dodge. Prioritizes nearest human life, but will attack all nearby life simultaneously if possible. Does not recover poise damage, and loses all resistances while staggered. Recovers 3 FP per round..

macros.name: Elemental Discharges (*tier3)
macros.description: (3d8 + Fai) elemental damage, 30 foot range from summoned wisp. Summons an intangible elemental wisp in adjacent space (functions as spirit summon). Wisp calls down five bolts per round. Using when wisp active halves costs. Up to three wisps active.

macros.name: Tranquil Walk of Peace (spell)
macros.description: Slow action. When resolved, all medium or smaller creatures within 20 feet can no longer take movement actions for the rest of the round.

macros.name: Disease of the Mind (spell)
macros.description: Slow action, 20 foot range. Targets an injured human (less than half HP). DC 14 sanity check or be inflicted with worsening mental disease. DC increases by one every day. Curable by Artisan of Physic, or specific healing spells.

presets.name: Worm Face Wanderer (Large)
presets.behavior: A tall twisted humanoid with giant worms on its head. Large variant. Creates deathblight clouds lasting five minutes. Dodges backwards up to 10 feet when attacked from front or sides by perceived greater/unknown threats.

macros.name: Head Slam (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: (2d10 + 4*Str) physical damage, hitting all adjacent spaces in front equal to its own size. Leaves deathblight cloud dealing 1d4 curse.

macros.name: Death Puke (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Fai) dark damage, 35 foot line width equal to its own size. Leaves deathblight cloud.

macros.name: Deathblight Fountain (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (4d6 + 3*Fai) dark damage, 4 poise damage, slow action. Hits all adjacent and spaces within 10 feet. Leaves deathblight cloud.

presets.name: Worm Face Wanderer (Massive)
presets.behavior: A tall twisted humanoid with giant worms on its head. Massive variant. Creates deathblight clouds lasting five minutes. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Head Slam (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: (3d12 + 4*Str) physical damage, hitting all adjacent spaces in front equal to its own size. Leaves deathblight cloud dealing 1d4 curse.

macros.name: Death Puke (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Fai) dark damage, 60 foot line width equal to its own size. Leaves deathblight cloud.

macros.name: Deathblight Fountain (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (4d6 + 3*Fai) dark damage, 4 poise damage, slow action. Hits all adjacent and spaces within 20 feet. Leaves deathblight cloud.

presets.name: Worm Face Wanderer (Medium)
presets.behavior: A tall twisted humanoid with a colony of giant worms attached to its head, where its face once was. The creatures head and body are enlarged making their arms and legs look smaller. Comes in a variety of sizes with slightly different stats and areas of effect based on its size. Any deathblight clouds the creature creates lasts for five minutes. The medium and large sized versions dodge backwards up to 10 feet when attacked from the front or sides, when targeted by an attack they perceive as a greater or unknown threat. The massive size version does not dodge.

macros.name: Head Slam (Inhuman Shuffle tier2)
macros.description: (1d8 + 4*Str) physical damage, hitting all adjacent spaces in front. Leaves deathblight cloud on all affected spaces dealing 1d4 curse to all who start or move into them.

macros.name: Death Puke (Status Spray (1d4 Curse) tier2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Fai) dark damage, 20 foot line. Spews rotted worms and deathblight. Leaves deathblight cloud on affected spaces.

macros.name: Deathblight Fountain (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (4d6 + 3*Fai) dark damage, 4 poise damage, slow action. Lifts head and pukes a fountain of rotted worms and death fog hitting all adjacent spaces. Leaves deathblight cloud.

presets.name: Geode Monk
presets.behavior: A headless animated form with a geode of mineral jutting from its midsec- tion. Often found in a meditation pose in older undisturbed areas of strange cosmic connection. May make a free Earthen Spear attack anytime a creature moves or is moved into that abilities range (as per the Sentinel weapon proficiency). Any creature damaged by this construct must make a DC 16 athletics or acrobatics check or be pushed away one grid space (5 feet). Prioritizes attacking creatures at its maximum Earthen Spear range, or pushing away the nearest creature otherwise. Dodges once per round 5 feet in any direction away from threat, somewhat intelligently. Whenever this construct takes poise dam- age, its physical resistance is dropped to 0 for the rest of the round. Each time this construct is hit by a melee attacker and doesn’t take poise dam- age, the attacker is jarred and takes one poise damage.

macros.name: Earthen Spear (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical + (1d8 + Int + Fai) magic damage, 15 foot range. Stabs with earthen spear. Extra d10 at exactly max range. Free reaction attack when creatures move into range (Sentinel).

macros.name: Crystal Discus
macros.description: (2d6 + Dex) physical + (2d6 + Int + Fai) magic damage, 15/10 foot range. Line or 180 degree arc. Creatures hit are pushed 5 feet away. Prioritizes hitting most creatures.

macros.name: Geomancy (Ruined Earth tier1)
macros.description: Changes earth in a 10x10 area within range. Used to split hostiles, prevent approach, or impact movement.

macros.name: Crystallize
macros.description: Once per round. 10x10 area in range. All creatures within lose 1d4 FP. This creature regains 1 FP for each die that rolled a 4.

macros.name: Poise Break (Self)
macros.description: When this construct takes poise damage, its physical resistance drops to 0 for the rest of the round. Apply 1 poise to self and set physical vulnerability equal to current physical resistance tiers for 1 round.

macros.name: Jarring Strike (Target)
macros.description: Each time this construct is hit by a melee attacker and does not take poise damage, the attacker takes 1 poise damage instead.

presets.name: Grme Elephant Sentinel
presets.behavior: An ancient construct of the oldest Grme Labryns. Shaped to be a hu- manoid elephant with great stone armor and a massive greatshield. Its shield protects all spaces except the two spaces directly behind it. Whenever a creature circles into an unprotected space while within 10 feet of this construct, the con- struct may spend 1 FP to turn and make a free spear attack targeting the creature. Does not dodge. Prioritizes nearest hostile creature and prefers to minimize movement. Will only drop its shield for one round if it reaches 7 or more poise damage.

macros.name: Great Spear (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d12 + 2*Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Third use on the same turn increases range to 15 feet.

macros.name: Raise Shield (Great Shield Protector tier3)
macros.description: Raise greatshield to protect from physical damage. Can hold over multiple rounds. When dropped, may shield bash adjacent creature for (1d6 + Str) physical, pushing them back and knocking prone. Each proc deals 1 poise to self.

macros.name: Elemental Bulwark
macros.description: Once per round. Add a damage type of its choice to the types blocked by its shield.

macros.name: Gore
macros.description: (3d10 + 2*(Str + Dex)) physical damage, 5 foot range, prepared action. Readies head to gore the next creature that comes in front over the next round. Only used when not defending with shield.

presets.name: Imp Golem
presets.behavior: A small gargoyle statue which moves swiftly in ambush. Will always move away from target after making an attack with their blade. -1 AP on any round it took magic damage. Dodges backwards (or to the left/right when there is no room to dodge backwards) 10 feet when attacked from the front, any number of times per round for no AP cost, but 1 FP cost.

macros.name: Jump Slash (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (2d6 + 2*Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 5 foot range. Can only be done after moving two spaces toward a target.

macros.name: Delayed Slash
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up. Prepared action that resolves if attacked from in front while dodging. Cannot be dodged by target.

macros.name: Fire Bomb
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) fire damage, 20 foot range. Used when at a height advantage.

presets.name: Life Filled Puppet
presets.behavior: (+1 athletics) A human like puppet which is created in areas of altered space where a great lose of life has occured. Devoid of normal features and looks as if made of wood and cloth, but seems to retain fragments of the persons which were killed nearby. Dodges intelligently, 5 feet in any direction, once per round. Prioritizes targets intelligently and may try to communicate, beg for mercy, and convince others that it can be saved and not to destroy it. Will often try and kill other humans and wildlife in an insane frenzy of confusion brought on by its form.

macros.name: Three Swings (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (2d6 + Dex) physical + 1d4 poison, (2d6 + Dex) physical + 1d4 poison, (3d10 + Str) physical + 1d6 poison damage, 5 foot range. Two frantic swipes followed by a wound up slam. Can target different spaces.

macros.name: Shock Coil (Elemental Slam tier2)
macros.description: (1d6 + Fai) lightning damage, 5 foot range. Used when hitting and damaging a hostile target, causes them to also take this damage.

macros.name: Spin Slam
macros.description: (1d12 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. If it hits, contested athletics check or take damage two more times in follow up spins that also threaten creatures within 5 feet.

macros.name: Beg for Mercy
macros.description: Audible range, once per round. DC 18 sanity check or unable to directly target this creature next round. Success makes creature permanently immune to this construct's version. Rolling 5 or less makes the effect permanent until the construct is destroyed.

presets.name: Living Armory (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: A mass of metal and arms of war that has animated. As it is damaged more of its weapons are revealed and it begins to move faster and defend itself better. The x that some of its resistances are multiplied by is equal to its current phase of HP. It seems to have grown from heaps of other constructs or strange magics which have taken hold in areas of prolonged battle. It seeks to avenge itself of war and prioritizes the most aggressive targets in battle and prioritizes using multiple different weapons each round. It does not dodge until its second phase, at which point it dodges 10 feet, somewhat intelligently, once per round for 1 AP. It gains an additional dodge per round in its third and also four phases.

macros.name: Slashing Swords (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 10 foot range. Number of swords = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Smashing Hammers
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Number of hammers = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Rending Axes
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Number of axes = current HP phase. Can target same or different spaces. Lowers target's physical resistance by one tier for one round (stacks).

presets.name: Living Armory (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: A mass of metal and arms of war that has animated. As it is damaged more of its weapons are revealed and it begins to move faster and defend itself better. The x that some of its resistances are multiplied by is equal to its current phase of HP. It seems to have grown from heaps of other constructs or strange magics which have taken hold in areas of prolonged battle. It seeks to avenge itself of war and prioritizes the most aggressive targets in battle and prioritizes using multiple different weapons each round. It does not dodge until its second phase, at which point it dodges 10 feet, somewhat intelligently, once per round for 1 AP. It gains an additional dodge per round in its third and also four phases.

macros.name: Slashing Swords (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 10 foot range. Number of swords = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Smashing Hammers
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Number of hammers = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Rending Axes
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Number of axes = current HP phase. Can target same or different spaces. Lowers target's physical resistance by one tier for one round (stacks).

macros.name: Stabbing Polearms (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 15 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Number of polearms = current phase. Each targets different space. Can push or pull creatures one space.

presets.name: Living Armory (Phase 3)
presets.behavior: A mass of metal and arms of war that has animated. As it is damaged more of its weapons are revealed and it begins to move faster and defend itself better. The x that some of its resistances are multiplied by is equal to its current phase of HP. It seems to have grown from heaps of other constructs or strange magics which have taken hold in areas of prolonged battle. It seeks to avenge itself of war and prioritizes the most aggressive targets in battle and prioritizes using multiple different weapons each round. It does not dodge until its second phase, at which point it dodges 10 feet, somewhat intelligently, once per round for 1 AP. It gains an additional dodge per round in its third and also four phases.

macros.name: Slashing Swords (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 10 foot range. Number of swords = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Smashing Hammers
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Number of hammers = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Rending Axes
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Number of axes = current HP phase. Can target same or different spaces. Lowers target's physical resistance by one tier for one round (stacks).

macros.name: Stabbing Polearms (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 15 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Number of polearms = current phase. Each targets different space. Can push or pull creatures one space.

macros.name: Screaming Artillery
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 4 poise damage, once per round, 80 foot range. Phase 3+ only. Launches bolt at target, also hitting within 5 feet. DC 16 athletics check or knocked prone.

macros.name: Phalanx of Shields
macros.description: Phase 3+ only. Up to twice per round, reaction. Produces shields blocking one attack of any damage type, converting to poise damage like a regular shield. Each proc deals 1 poise to self.

presets.name: Living Armory (Phase 4)
presets.behavior: A mass of metal and arms of war that has animated. As it is damaged more of its weapons are revealed and it begins to move faster and defend itself better. The x that some of its resistances are multiplied by is equal to its current phase of HP. It seems to have grown from heaps of other constructs or strange magics which have taken hold in areas of prolonged battle. It seeks to avenge itself of war and prioritizes the most aggressive targets in battle and prioritizes using multiple different weapons each round. It does not dodge until its second phase, at which point it dodges 10 feet, somewhat intelligently, once per round for 1 AP. It gains an additional dodge per round in its third and also four phases.

macros.name: Slashing Swords (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 10 foot range. Number of swords = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Smashing Hammers
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Number of hammers = current HP phase. Each must target a different space.

macros.name: Rending Axes
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Number of axes = current HP phase. Can target same or different spaces. Lowers target's physical resistance by one tier for one round (stacks).

macros.name: Stabbing Polearms (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 15 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Number of polearms = current phase. Each targets different space. Can push or pull creatures one space.

macros.name: Screaming Artillery
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 4 poise damage, once per round, 80 foot range. Phase 3+ only. Launches bolt at target, also hitting within 5 feet. DC 16 athletics check or knocked prone.

macros.name: Phalanx of Shields
macros.description: Phase 3+ only. Up to twice per round, reaction. Produces shields blocking one attack of any damage type, converting to poise damage like a regular shield. Each proc deals 1 poise to self.

macros.name: Magic Core (Elemental Ray tier3)
macros.description: (4d4 + Int + Fai) magic damage, 40 foot range. Phase 4 only. Fires beam hitting all creatures in a line. DC 14 sanity or diplomacy check or be inflicted with dazed, deafened, and impaired vision for one round.

presets.name: Metallic Crystal Golem
presets.behavior: (+4 athletics, +11 diplomacy) A Sand Golem which has managed to reform itself by degrading and absorbing metal objects. This construct has the shape of a Small Crystal Golem but with opaque metallic crystal covering its jagged struc- ture. Prioritizes the nearest creature with the greatest combined intelligence and faith. This construct is immune to physical damage and absorbs for each tier of resistance above 100%. Dodges once per round up to 15 feet backwards. This construct may dodge into occupied spaces and through the spaces of creatures smaller than it. When it does so, those creatures are knocked prone and pushed out of the spaces of this construct.

macros.name: Metal Swipes (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (4d4 + Str) physical damage, 4d2 bleed build up, 2 poise damage, 5 foot range. Crystalline rust forms in wounds preventing bleed recovery for one round.

macros.name: Steel Slam
macros.description: (2d10 + Str) physical + (2d6 + Fai) magic damage, 5 poise damage, 15 foot range. Metal crystals erupt in all surrounding spaces. All grounded creatures hit take damage.

macros.name: Liquid Metal (Radial Wave tier3)
macros.description: (4d6 + Fai) physical damage, 2d6 bleed build up, slow action, 30 foot range. Liquefies into a jagged metal wave in every direction. Reforms in any unoccupied location within range.

macros.name: Preserve in Mercury (spell)
macros.description: When bringing a creature to 0 HP, may form mercury into their body. Produces 2 Mercurous Failure monstrosities in adjacent spaces.

macros.name: Metallic Coat (spell)
macros.description: When inflicted by a status condition, buildup, or detrimental effect, may reflect all of those effects back toward any one creature within 30 feet.

presets.name: Patchwork Gargoyle
presets.behavior: A large stone gargoyle patched up with old flesh and bone. The broken variation cannot move, has half the HP and AP, can only use its ”Foul Burn” ability, and gives only 7 souls upon defeat. The non broken variation prioritizes nearby targets, and can dodge once per round up to 25 feet backwards when threatened by the first attack in a round. Its dodge can move it through the spaces of other creatures, and any creatures it dodges through take the first instance of damage from its Twinblade Sweeps ability.

macros.name: Foul Burn (Status Laser tier2)
macros.description: (4d6) fire damage, 4d4 poison build up, 100 foot range. Breathes rot fume in a line as wide as the creature.

macros.name: Twinblade Sweeps (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (2d6 + 2*Str) physical x2, 10 foot range. First sweep from left to front, second from right to front.

macros.name: Whirlwind Spins
macros.description: (18d2 + 2*Str) physical damage, 9d2 bleed build up, slow action, 20 foot range. Powerful propeller spin: 180 degree arc front, then left, then right. Creatures hit take damage each time they are hit.

presets.name: Puppet Construct
presets.behavior: A patchwork of metal and wood forming a cage like chest and multiple danging limbs. Moves slowly close to other constructs. Upon being damaged in a round it heats up its frame, enters overdrive and doubles the AP of its next turn. Can dodge only on round where it is in overdrive, 10 feet, backwards on first threat. Prioritizes nearest targets. Knocks itself prone at start of its turn if overdrive is not refreshed.

macros.name: Shortbow Shot (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Dex) physical damage, 35 foot range. In overdrive: fires at up to four targets per action, damage becomes fire, moves two spaces while shooting.

macros.name: Spear Thrusts (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. In overdrive: attacks up to four spaces per action, damage becomes fire.

macros.name: Magic Pot
macros.description: (1d6 + Str) magic damage, 20 foot range. Breaks a pot that spawns a magic projectile toward a target.

presets.name: Sand Golem
presets.behavior: (+2 athletics, +8 diplomacy) A crystal golem which has fallen down mountains, been battered by the sea, and eroded into a shining sand. Prioritizes the nearest creature, or the nearest creature with the most amount of metal on their person. Whenever this construct is struck by physical damage from a melee weapon, the weapon takes 2d2 durability loss. Dodges twice per round 5 feet backwards for 1 AP each, by turning to sand and reforming in the other location. Whenever this construct causes a metal piece of equipment to take durability loss, it reforms part of its body into a metallic crystal. After 6 reformations this creature is fully healed. After 12 this creature becomes a Metallic Crystal Golem construct with full HP and FP.

macros.name: Sand Buffer (Sandstorm tier3)
macros.description: (8d2 + Dex) physical damage, 10 foot range. Crystal sand whirl in a space, hitting it and adjacent spaces. If damage exceeds 16 (before resistances), target gets impaired vision for one round.

macros.name: Enter Mind (Status Spray tier2)
macros.description: (2d6) bleed build up, 20 foot range. Sand enters mouth, nose, eyes. DC 11 sanity check or take full bleed; half on success.

macros.name: Absorb Metal
macros.description: Reaction after hitting with Sand Buffer. All metal equipment on all creatures hit by Sand Buffer takes 1d2 durability loss. Each absorption counts toward reformation (6 = full heal, 12 = becomes Metallic Crystal Golem).

presets.name: Sand Imp
presets.behavior: A small Imp like creature with sharp features. These sand constructs can be formed to spring out of deep sand where many creatures have recently parished. Prioratizes swarming any nearby living creature by making copies of itself and having them all focus the same target. Dodges three times per round, at the first instance of threat, five feet directly away from the threat.

macros.name: Poke (Light Weapon Swing tier1)
macros.description: (1d4 + Dex) physical damage, (1d4) fire damage, 10 foot range. Poke with a trident made from hot sand.

macros.name: Trick Image
macros.description: Slow action. Create two copies (5 HP, no resistances, one Poke per turn, 3 space movement, cannot dodge). Only one instance active per Sand Imp. Initiating this slow action is not interrupted by dodging.

macros.name: Explode (Sandstorm tier3)
macros.description: (3d4 + Dex) physical damage, 1d2 durability damage, 10 foot range. On reaching 0 HP, may spend FP to explode, threatening all non-construct creatures in range.

presets.name: School of Sculpted Faces
presets.behavior: A ball of twisted mask like faces. Said to be mages who have peered into incomprehensible truths and turned their minds into cosmic ore. Regenerates FP equal to one tenth of its max HP (minimum one, rounded down). Prioritizes closest threat first, then what it perceives is its greatest threat. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Homing Summons x1 (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage per shot, 1 shot(s), 35 foot range. Fires 1 magical stone(s) from its mouths, hitting any number of targets one after another.

macros.name: Homing Summons x2 (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage per shot, 2 shot(s), 35 foot range. Fires 2 magical stone(s) from its mouths, hitting any number of targets one after another.

macros.name: Homing Summons x3 (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage per shot, 3 shot(s), 35 foot range. Fires 3 magical stone(s) from its mouths, hitting any number of targets one after another.

macros.name: Homing Summons x4 (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage per shot, 4 shot(s), 35 foot range. Fires 4 magical stone(s) from its mouths, hitting any number of targets one after another.

macros.name: Homing Summons x5 (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage per shot, 5 shot(s), 35 foot range. Fires 5 magical stone(s) from its mouths, hitting any number of targets one after another.

macros.name: Freezing Mist
macros.description: Breathes cold mist around itself. 2d4 frost build up to any creature starting, ending, or moving into an adjacent space. Lasts two rounds.

macros.name: Mouth Beams (Elemental Ray tier3)
macros.description: (4d8 + 2*Int) magic damage, 30 foot range, slow action. Fires four separate beams hitting all spaces in four different lines. All creatures hit lose 1d2 FP, and this creature regenerates all FP lost by targets.

presets.name: Small Crystal Golem
presets.behavior: (+2 athletics, +10 diplomacy) A growth of crystal residue which has animated itself through the fleeting thoughts contained within. If this creatures FP is drained then it takes 2d12 true damage. Prioritizes nearby creatures which have disturbed the crystal it resides near, or the nearest intelligent creature. Dodges once per round, 5 feet backwards at the first instance of threat from the front.

macros.name: Crystal Swipes
macros.description: (1d8 + Str) physical then (1d12 + Str) magic damage, 5/10 foot range. Swipes crystalline arm, then grows protrusion and makes a second swipe at extended range.

macros.name: Crystal Slam (*tier2)
macros.description: (1d12 + Str) magic damage, 10 foot range. Slams ground causing crystals to erupt in all surrounding spaces. All grounded creatures hit take damage.

presets.name: Ultra Great Arms
presets.behavior: A strangely impractical construct formed of two ultra greatswords fash- ioned as arms onto a partially metallic torso with a greatshield in place of a head and face. It walks along its greatsword arms as though they were stilts. When- ever a creature moves or is moved within 10 feet or less of this construct, it may make a free reaction Arm Swing attack targeting them. When attacked directly from the front, this construct automatically blocks all physical damage as though it has a raised greatshield. Prioritizes nearest threat. Dodges once per round, at first threat directly in front of itself from within 10 feet, by dodging forward up to 15 feet. This dodge can be made through any medium or smaller creatures and causes them to take the damage of one Arm Swing attack.

macros.name: Arm Swing (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Str) physical damage, 10 foot range. Can be used again as reaction for 3 AP immediately after (twin attack). If the reduced cost version is used off-turn, it is free. Creatures moving within 10 feet trigger a free reaction attack.

macros.name: Push
macros.description: When hitting a medium or smaller creature with a 5+ AP attack, may push them up to 10 feet in any direction.

macros.name: Ruined Earth (*tier1)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical damage. Moves in a frenzy up to 15 feet in a line threatening all medium or smaller creatures, then repeats two more times without retracing. All spaces become difficult terrain.

presets.name: Watcher Golem
presets.behavior: A large statue of stone and jutting crystal cores. Often in the shape of a beast or armored knight. Moves in quick robotic bursts and attacks with large stone sword and jumping slams. Prioritizes closest target. Does not dodge unless as described by its Repeating Slams ability.

macros.name: Tall Overhead Slash (Ruined Earth tier1)
macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Str) physical damage, 3 poise damage. Move up to three spaces before attacking in melee range.

macros.name: Repeating Slams (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical damage, hits all spaces underneath and adjacent. Floats up 10 feet and three spaces before slamming. Creatures in its spaces pushed out and knocked prone. Repeats three times. Can be slow action to use as dodge reaction.

macros.name: Fire Breath
macros.description: (3d6 + 3*Fai) fire damage, 10 foot range. Breathes fire and spins, hitting all spaces within 10 feet in a circle.

presets.name: Abyss Spawn Limbs
presets.behavior: (+3 athletics) A mass of floating dark liquid and human limbs. The first time this entity is struck with physical damage in a turn in combat, the attacker must make a DC 16 diplomacy or sanity check or be forced to turn around and move three spaces in the opposite direction of this entity. If they do not have the AP to complete the movement then they must spend the rest of their AP attempting to do so and then end their turn. This monstrosity has full dark vision. Prioritizes nearest non undead humans which it can perceive. Can dodge once per round, towards a hostile target, with 10 foot range.

macros.name: Spinning Flail (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (1d12 + Str + Dex) physical damage, 5 foot range. Leaves permanent black liquid dealing 1d8 dark damage to grounded creatures entering. Can be heavy attack for range increase to 10 feet and 180 degree arc.

macros.name: Focused Limb Pierce
macros.description: (2d10 + Str) physical damage, 15 foot range. Pierces all physical resistance and blocking shields. Leaves permanent black liquid dealing 1d8 dark to grounded creatures entering.

presets.name: Abyss Spawn Sensor
presets.behavior: (+3 perception) A mass of dark liquid and human facial features. The first time this entity is struck with elemental damage in a turn in combat, the attacker must make a DC 16 diplomacy or sanity check or be forced to turn around and move three spaces in the opposite direction of this monstrosity. If they do not have the AP to complete the movement then they must spend the rest of their AP attempting to do so and then end their turn. This entity has full dark vision. Regenerates Int mod FP per round. Prioritizes non undead humans which it can perceive. Fights intelligently. Can dodge once per round by spending 1 FP to teleport to another unoccupied space within 10 feet. Dodges intelligently.

macros.name: Vision Cone of Dark Illusion (Cone of Confusion tier2)
macros.description: Chooses one creature within sight. DC 12 diplomacy or sanity check or be inflicted with berserk targeting only allies for half of total AP.

macros.name: Departing Walk (spell)
macros.description: Slow action, 30 foot range. Drops expanding bead of darkness. All non-Abyssal creatures in range cannot take movement toward this entity for the rest of the round.

macros.name: Black Harpoon (spell)
macros.description: (1d10 + Fai) dark damage, 40 foot range. DC 16 acrobatics check or be moved two spaces in a direction of this creature's choosing.

presets.name: Deathrite Bird (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: A very smart being which is born from a death corrupted Nightbird. Its flesh has mummified and its wings have become a void of ethereal blackness. A shepherd for deathroot within the higher places of the world. Has a great empathy for those that live in death. This entity is able to initiate and resolve multiple slow actions per round and does not drop slow actions when dodging. Prioritizes targets in an intelligent way, but slightly prioritizes those who have recently attacked nearby undead. Spends 3 FP once per round, when hit by an attack it perceives as powerful, to make a ”death poker slash” attack and dodge by flying up to 30 feet over its attacker and landing 15 feet behind them. If it cannot fly over them then it dodges backwards up to 20 feet. Regenerates Int FP each round.

macros.name: Death Poker Slash
macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Dex) physical damage, 2d4 frost build up, 10 foot range. Slashes with deathroot greatsword hitting all spaces in 180 degree arc in front.

macros.name: Implant Death (Let the Feast Begin tier3)
macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, then if grappled: (2d6) true damage, 2d4 curse build up, 2d4 frost build up, 5 foot range. Hand to hand grapple, physical damage on hit, true/curse/frost on grapple as deathroot is thrust into chest.

macros.name: Ghostflame Snake
macros.description: (4d12 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 2d6 frost build up, slow action, 40 foot range. Ghostflame explosion running along ground in 10 foot thick line.

presets.name: Deathrite Bird (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: A very smart being which is born from a death corrupted Nightbird. Its flesh has mummified and its wings have become a void of ethereal blackness. A shepherd for deathroot within the higher places of the world. Has a great empathy for those that live in death. macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, then if grappled: (2d6) true damage, 2d4 curse build up, 2d4 frost build up, 5 foot range. Hand to hand grapple, physical damage on hit, true/curse/frost on grapple as deathroot is thrust into chest.

macros.name: Ghostflame Snake
macros.description: (4d12 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 2d6 frost build up, slow action, 40 foot range. Ghostflame explosion running along ground in 10 foot thick line.

macros.name: Seismic Toss (*tier4)
macros.description: (4d6) true damage, 5 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Leaps and slams a grappled creature against the ground. Only usable on creatures grappled with Implant Death.

macros.name: Ritual Spears
macros.description: (3d6 + Int + Fai) dark + (3d6 + Str + Dex) physical damage, slow action, 80 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Conjures skeleton spears that rain on a 40x40 area.

presets.name: Deathrite Bird (Phase 3)
presets.behavior: A very smart being which is born from a death corrupted Nightbird. Its flesh has mummified and its wings have become a void of ethereal blackness. macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Dex) physical damage, 2d4 frost build up, 10 foot range. Slashes with deathroot greatsword hitting all spaces in 180 degree arc in front.

macros.description: (3d6 + Str) physical damage, then if grappled: (2d6) true damage, 2d4 curse build up, 2d4 frost build up, 5 foot range. Hand to hand grapple, physical damage on hit, true/curse/frost on grapple as deathroot is thrust into chest.

macros.description: (4d12 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 2d6 frost build up, slow action, 40 foot range. Ghostflame explosion running along ground in 10 foot thick line.

macros.description: (4d6) true damage, 5 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Leaps and slams a grappled creature against the ground. Only usable on creatures grappled with Implant Death.

macros.name: Ritual Spears
macros.description: (3d6 + Int + Fai) dark + (3d6 + Str + Dex) physical damage, slow action, 80 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Conjures skeleton spears that rain on a 40x40 area.

macros.name: Ghostflame Explosion (Explosion tier4)
macros.description: Slow action, 80 foot range. Phase 3+ only. If initiated with Ghostflame Snake, when they resolve together: damage doubled, range doubled, four explosions in cardinal directions.

presets.name: Eye of the Abyss
presets.behavior: (+5 perception) A conglomeration of eyes and faces in a twisting black ether. Usually found deep below, where the Abyss spreads, or where other horrible things command dominion. The first time this monstrosity is struck with any damage on a turn in combat, the attacker must make a DC 18 Diplomacy or Sanity check or be forced to turn around and move three spaces in the opposite direction of this monstrosity. If they do not have the AP to complete the movement then they must spend the rest of their AP attempting to do so and then end their turn. This entity has full dark vision. Regenerates Int mod FP per round. Prioritizes non undead humans which it can perceive. Fights intelligently. Can dodge once per round by spending 1 FP to teleport to another unoccupied space within 20 feet. Dodges intelligently.

macros.name: Vision Cone of Dark Illusion (Cone of Confusion tier2)
macros.description: Chooses one creature within sight. DC 15 diplomacy or sanity check or berserk targeting only allies for half of total AP.

macros.name: Abyssal Laser (Elemental Ray tier3)
macros.description: (6d8 + Fai + Int) dark damage, 3 poise damage, slow action, 60 foot range. 10 foot thick line of heavy black light.

macros.name: Torrential Deep (spell)
macros.description: (2d6 + Int + Fai) dark damage, 30 foot range. 10x10 area of dark rain lasting three rounds. Bursts on cast and at start of this creature's turns.

macros.name: Soul Missiles (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (1d10 + Int) magic damage, 40 foot range. Launches three soul projectiles toward any spaces.

presets.name: Falling Star Infant (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: (+4 diplomacy, -5 stealth) A Legendary cosmic being of the void. A young formed star of the cosmic currents. Behaves intelligently based on what it learns. Dodges once per round intelligently by using its Rolling Boulder ability to move 15 feet forward or backwards. When transitioning phases, as a reaction, it triggers Gravity Bursts in all spaces around it. The Gravity Bursts behave as per the ability of the same name.

macros.name: Jaw and Tail Attacks (Combination Attacks tier3)
macros.description: (1d10 + Str) physical, (2d12 + Dex) physical, (1d10 + Str) physical damage. First and third: mandible swipe hitting all spaces within 10 feet in front. Second: sweeping tail hitting 180 degree arc behind up to 30 feet.

macros.name: Tail Slam and Sweep
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 30 foot range. Slams tail at a target not in front, hitting all spaces from target back toward entity, then sweeps in an arc to its back side.

macros.name: Rolling Boulder (Bull Charge tier2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical damage. Used as sprint or dodge. Regenerates 4d4 FP at end of each turn it was used. Rolls over all spaces moved through. DC 20 acrobatics or knocked prone. Pushed left or right.

macros.name: Nebula
macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Int) physical/magic damage, 80 foot range. Sweeps arm in 180 degree arc at range, then area explodes in multicolored nebula dealing same as magic damage.

macros.name: Copy Grab
macros.description: (4d6 + 2*Str) physical damage, once per round, 80 foot range. Disappears, up to 4 copies appear over targets from different cardinal directions. Targets not dodging directly away are grabbed, take damage, and locked up for one round.

macros.name: Cosmic Rain (spell)
macros.description: (2d6) magic damage, once per round, 100 foot range. Start of turn: bolts drop randomly within 100 feet. All creatures roll d20; result of 8 or less means a bolt targets them.

presets.name: Falling Star Infant (Phase 2)
presets.behavior: (+4 diplomacy, -5 stealth) A Legendary cosmic being of the void. A young formed star of the cosmic currents. Behaves intelligently based on what it learns. Dodges once per round intelligently by using its Rolling Boulder ability to move 15 feet forward or backwards. macros.name: Cosmic Rain (spell)
macros.description: (2d6) magic damage, once per round, 100 foot range. Start of turn: bolts drop randomly within 100 feet. All creatures roll d20; result of 8 or less means a bolt targets them.

macros.name: Gravity Burst (Ruined Earth tier2)
macros.description: (1d12 + Int) physical damage, 40 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Jerks head indicating where a 10x10 eruption of earthen spikes forms on the ground. Spikes become difficult terrain for one round. Repetitions and instances handled by GM.

macros.name: Gravity Beam (Elemental Ray tier3)
macros.description: (4d6 + Int) magic damage, 80 foot range, slow action. Phase 2+ only. Beam as wide as creature. DC 17 athletics or acrobatics check or be pulled 40 feet toward this entity.

macros.name: Gravity Waves (Flame Ice Ring tier4)
macros.description: (4d8 + Int) magic + (4d8 + Fai) dark damage, 20/30/40 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Three pulses of gravitational energy. DC 22 athletics or acrobatics check or limb fracture on one leg.

macros.name: Meteor Rain
macros.description: (10d20 + Int) magic + (10d20 + Fai) dark damage, slow action, 300 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Opens void holes. Each creature rolls d20 three times. 12 or less = large 15x15 meteor (full damage), 13-18 = small meteor (half damage).

presets.name: Falling Star Infant (Phase 3)
presets.behavior: (+4 diplomacy, -5 stealth) A Legendary cosmic being of the void. A young formed star of the cosmic currents. Behaves intelligently based on what it learns. macros.description: (4d8 + Int) magic + (4d8 + Fai) dark damage, 20/30/40 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Three pulses of gravitational energy. DC 22 athletics or acrobatics check or limb fracture on one leg.

macros.name: Meteor Rain
macros.description: (10d20 + Int) magic + (10d20 + Fai) dark damage, slow action, 300 foot range. Phase 2+ only. Opens void holes. Each creature rolls d20 three times. 12 or less = large 15x15 meteor (full damage), 13-18 = small meteor (half damage).

macros.name: Meteor
macros.description: (4d8 + Int) magic + (3d8 + Int) dark damage, slow action, 100 foot range. Phase 3 only. Opens wormhole to summon meteorite. Hits all within 20 feet of target.

macros.name: Supernova (Explosion tier4)
macros.description: (15d20 + 2*Int) magic + (15d20 + 2*Fai) dark + (6d6) true damage, slow action, 5 kilometer range. Phase 3 only. Entity implodes causing annihilating explosion destroying everything in range. Reappears in any space within 200 feet.

presets.name: Lesser Flesh Tentacle
presets.behavior: A mass of amalgamated flesh caused by the Formless Mothers influence. It takes the shape of a boil like protrusion with a tentacle like appendage that seeks to consume more biomass and create more of itself. Prioritizes weaker targets in range. Does not move or dodge.

macros.name: Amalgamate
macros.description: Slow action. Grab at target within 40 feet, pull up to 15 feet. DC 14 athletics check or amalgamate one limb into terrain (limb loss + anchored). DC 16 sanity check each turn or take 4d8 true damage.

macros.name: Mind Rending Whip
macros.description: (6d4) dark damage, 1d10 bleed build up, 1 poise damage, 30 foot range.

presets.name: Minor Loop Parasite
presets.behavior: A flying parasite of time and reality with undefined form. Seeks to loop anomalous time and protect others that do the same. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Temporal Kinesis (spell)
macros.description: Reaction. Anytime this entity or those it protects are interacted with unfavorably, it may will those interactions backwards in time to a favorable reality. When the entity dies, the effects are reversed.

macros.name: Seize Time
macros.description: Slow action, 60 foot range. DC 22 sanity check or lose 4d2 FP and one prominent memory. This entity regains the FP lost. Memories restored on death.

presets.name: Nocturnal Mask
presets.behavior: A massive, floating, contorted face which almost looks to be carved of fine wood. Cannot move into light, but also cant be interacted with by anything that is within light. If placed within light or exposed to light it will become ethereal and intangible. Seeks to enter and manifest the dreams of humans nearby by stalking them and pulling their dreams into reality. Constantly moves to maintain a 25 foot distance to its targets, its movements do not cost AP, and they cannot be stopped or hindered in any way. Absorbs all elemental damage at a rate of 25%. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Draw Into Reality
macros.description: Once per round, 25 foot range. Stares into a target in darkness at exactly 25 feet. DC 28 sanity check or have nightmares pulled into reality. Only the target can interact with the dreamscape. Sleeping targets are instantly killed on failure.

macros.name: Pillars of Conscious
macros.description: (4d6 + Fai) dark + (4d6 + Fai) lightning damage, slow action, 70 foot range. Creates four 15x15 swirling areas. Regains 1d4 FP per creature within when conjured. When resolved, areas implode. Creatures hit are put into deep sleep if not killed. Deep sleeping creatures take no further damage from this.

presets.name: One Who Sees
presets.behavior: A scarred and malformed eye with a strange language carved deep into its flesh. Can only be detected with a DC 22 knowledge of cosmic influence, or if a creature is adjacent to it. Does not dodge or make regular movement actions.

macros.name: Peer Within
macros.description: Create a malformed copy of a human within 100 feet in an adjacent space. Copy has target's AP and HP but only basic light attacks with no scaling. Copy prioritizes its original; extra damage die each time it damages them. Damage to the copy reflects back. Max twice per round, one copy per human.

macros.name: Blink
macros.description: Slow action. Teleport to another space within 30 feet.

presets.name: Oracle (Large)
presets.behavior: A large bulbous entity wrapped in white cloth. Glides on its bulb body. Carries a twisted golden horn. Prioritizes nearest hostile, then noisiest. Dodges once per round at first threat, 15 feet to its left.

macros.name: Bubble (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int + Fai) lightning damage, 2 poise damage, 30 foot range.

macros.name: Horn Smack (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d12 + Str) physical damage, 10 foot range.

macros.name: Popping Bubble
macros.description: (4d12 + Fai) lightning damage, 25 foot range. Pops and explodes hitting all within 10 feet.

macros.name: Cascade of Bubbles (Element Breath tier4)
macros.description: (6d12 + Str) lightning damage, slow action, 35 foot cone. Not interrupted by dodging.

macros.name: Horn (Inspiring Presence tier1)
macros.description: (3d6 + 2*Fai) healing and 2d4 FP restoration, 40 foot range. Heals allied creatures. Cannot be used if dazed.

presets.name: Oracle (Medium)
presets.behavior: A bulbous entity wrapped in white cloth around its vaguely humanoid form. The cloth obscures its lack of legs as it glides and slithers across the ground on its bulb body. Its face is also obscured by the cloth which forms another large bulb at the top of its head. Each of these entities carry a twisted golden horn proportional to its size which it blows a single ominous note from. This entities are said to only be found when a new era of existence is coming into the world. Prioritizes nearest hostile, followed by the noisiest. Dodges once per round at the first instance of threat, 10/15 feet to its left.

macros.name: Bubble (Elemental Bolt tier1)
macros.description: (3d6 + Int + Fai) lightning damage, 2 poise damage, 30 foot range. Blows horn to form a golden bubble that travels toward target.

macros.name: Horn Smack (Heavy Weapon Swing tier2)
macros.description: (2d6 + Str) physical damage, 5 foot range. Swings horn at creature.

macros.name: Popping Bubble
macros.description: (4d12 + Fai) lightning damage, 25 foot range. Conjures a bubble at target space that pops, hitting all within 10 feet.

macros.name: Cascade of Bubbles (Element Breath tier4)
macros.description: (6d12 + Str) lightning damage, slow action, 35 foot range. Blows cascade in a cone. Not interrupted by dodging. Large size only.

macros.name: Horn (Inspiring Presence tier1)
macros.description: (3d6 + 2*Fai) healing and 2d4 FP restoration, 40 foot range. Heals all allied creatures in range. Cannot be used if dazed.

presets.name: Pale Brain Kin
presets.behavior: A small pale humanoid like creature of the endless void. It seeks out the influence of greater entities from the void in order to absorb all nearby eldritch knowledge. Prioritizes slower targets. Can dodge twice per round in any direction based intelligently on the knowledge it has deduced from combat, or drained from its victims.

macros.name: Constrain
macros.description: Once per round. Points toward a hostile creature it can see. All their movement AP costs are doubled over the next full round.

macros.name: Knowledge Drain
macros.description: (1d10 + 3*Dex) physical + (6d4) true damage, 4 poise damage, 5 foot range. Grab at target. DC 16 sanity check or strange appendage embedded in skull, take true/poise damage, lose one point from a random knowledge skill above zero. If knowledge reaches zero, instant death.

macros.name: Void Bolt
macros.description: (1d6 + Int) magic damage, once per round, 40 foot range. Invisible bolt that cannot be dodged unless target has knowledge of cosmic influence 5+. Regains FP equal to half damage dealt.

presets.name: Scrawling Brain
presets.behavior: A small pale brain with multiple tentacle appendages that contains the knowledge of higher beings. The brain has a faded gray spike that protrudes from its front, which is used to carve its knowledge upon any surfaces it can find. Unfortu- nately though, it seems to write in an undecipherable language of runes and forgotten letters. Can often be found near Pale Brain Kin. In combat it prioritizes the nearest being with the highest single knowledge skill. Dodges once per round with perfect knowledge of attacks, up to 10 feet away from a threat.

macros.name: Scrawl Upon Flesh
macros.description: (2d6) true damage, 5 foot range. DC 14 sanity check each turn for 5 rounds or frenzy until success. Frenzy stacks over rounds but not from multiple hits.

macros.name: Forbidden Knowledge
macros.description: (3d8) true damage, 40 foot range. DC 13 sanity check or have a random knowledge skill increased by five but be dazed until using it. On next use of that skill, take damage and bonus removed.

macros.name: Read From The Past
macros.description: Rewinds damage to itself. Can increase HP to the value it was up to three attacks ago (attacks which hit and damaged it). Usable only on its own turns.

presets.name: Spectral Canvas
presets.behavior: A streak of colors which move and swirl along each other in space, re- gardless of the position with which it is perceived. A dimensional manifestation of time. Intangible and flying. Absorbs physical damage at a rate of 25% and is immune to elemental damage. Does not dodge, does not prioritize targets but will move slowly around any beings which perceive it. If this entity reaches 0 FP it is removed from perception and is ”defeated”.

macros.name: Peer Into Time (Brain Itch tier4)
macros.description: 3 poise damage, sight range. Any creature that first turns to look at or starts their turn looking at this entity takes poise damage. Entity loses 1 FP each activation.

macros.name: Move Through Time
macros.description: Sight range. When a creature is staggered and can perceive this entity, it moves the creature through to another position in time.

presets.name: Vileblood Lich
presets.behavior: A barely humanoid skeletal form with pieces of flesh hanging on to bare bones. The flesh is not representative of the location on its body and instead is mounds of eyes, brain matter, hair, and alien like appendages. Foreign tentacles wrap around the creatures exposed rib cage. A form that is thoroughly blessed by the Formless Mother. It floats a few feet off the ground limply and prioritizes targets intelligently. Every time it takes damage it leaves a mist of flaming blood, which it can teleport to in order to dodge up to three times a round for only one AP. The mists last for 24 hours. Dodges intelligently. Once per round whenever a creature faces the direction of the Lich it must make a DC 10 sanity check or lose 1d4 FP and take 2d6 true damage. The FP lost is gained by the Lich.

macros.name: Gaze
macros.description: Once per round. Any creature facing the direction of the Lich must DC 10 sanity check or lose 1d4 FP and take 2d6 true damage. The FP lost is gained by the Lich. GM determines which creatures are facing it.

macros.name: Exsanguinate
macros.description: Reaction. When a creature within 60 feet is bled out, may force them to immediately take bleed's next-turn damage and clear the condition so they can be bled again.

macros.name: Bone Nihil Activation
macros.description: Slow action. Consumes three accumulated blood curses. Deals 15 bleed build up three times in rapid succession. Creatures bled out by this are inflicted with limb break on a random limb for each time they are bled out. Heals Lich to full HP on current pool. Cannot be used again for 24 hours.

macros.name: Bone Nihil
macros.description: Triggers at half HP on any HP pool. All hostile creatures within 100 feet get a blood curse. Three curses accumulated allows a slow action to consume them: 15 bleed build up three times in rapid succession. Bled out creatures get limb break on random limb. Activating heals to full HP on current pool. Cooldown: 24 hours.

macros.name: Brain Shift
macros.description: (4d4) true damage, 3 poise damage, once per round, 100 foot range. Choose two creatures that can see the Lich. Both are threatened. Both take damage unless they both dodge directly away from each other. If this kills a creature, it is amalgamated with its pair (instant death).

macros.name: Blood Flame Toss
macros.description: (3d6 + Fai) fire damage, 3d4 bleed build up, 40 foot range. Hits all in a line, or all in a 25 foot left-right line through a target space.

macros.name: Lacerated Earth
macros.description: (1d4 + Int) dark damage, 1d4 bleed build up, 1 poise damage, slow action. Creates 20 foot area of cosmic blood lasting four rounds. Difficult terrain, deals damage/bleed/poise each time a creature moves into an affected space. One area active at a time.

presets.name: Void Born Star (Phase 1)
presets.behavior: (+4 diplomacy, -5 stealth) A Legendary cosmic being that makes up the stars. Multicolored planet-like orbs forming a spine with skeletal arms, iridescent wings, and a skeletal head with cosmic eye. Behaves with utmost intelligence. At start of turns, all hostile creatures within 100 feet must DC 22 sanity check or take 2d8 magic damage; entity regains 4 FP per failure. Does not dodge.

macros.name: Nebula
macros.description: (2d12 + 2*Int) physical/magic damage, 80 foot range. Sweeps arm in 180 degree arc then area explodes in multicolored nebula dealing magic damage.

macros.name: Copy Grab
macros.description: (4d6 + 2*Str) physical damage, once per round, 80 foot range. Up to 4 copies appear over targets. Those not dodging away are grabbed and locked up for one round.

macros.name: Cosmic Rain (spell)
macros.description: (2d6) magic damage, once per round. Bolts drop randomly within 100 feet. All creatures roll d20; 8 or less = targeted.
